title: SeeSE3: Emergence of 3D Space in Vision Features
summary: In this paper, we ask whether vision foundation models construct representations that reflect the intrinsic properties of 3D Euclidean space. Unlike previous works that probe 3D awareness of vision features by regressing image-centric quantities such as depth or normals, we investigate the relation between the structure of the space of visual features and the group of Euclidean transformations $SE(3)$. We propose a set of probes to evaluate this relation from both topological and geometric perspectives: a mutual neighborhood metric that measures the alignment between feature neighborhoods and spatial topology, and a Poincaré Adapter to test the linear accessibility of the geometry of camera motion from latent displacements in static scenes. We show that self-supervised vision models, which, in principle, have not been trained with direct 3D supervision or active agency, possess latent subspaces that are remarkably strongly correlated with three-dimensional Euclidean space, when probed correctly. Building on this insight we propose a new class of "Latent-Space Navigation" techniques that perform visual odometry and localization purely in the latent space, bypassing the need for explicit 3D reconstruction.

AI.tldr: 本文探究视觉基础模型是否构建了反映3D欧几里得空间内在属性的表征，并提出拓扑与几何探针验证了自监督视觉模型在隐空间中存在与三维欧氏空间强相关的子空间，并基于此提出无需显式3D重建的"隐空间导航"技术。
AI.motivation: 以往工作通过回归深度或法线等图像中心量来探测视觉特征的3D感知能力，但未深入探究视觉特征空间结构与三维欧几里得变换群SE(3)之间的内在关系，本文旨在填补这一研究空白。
AI.method: 本文从拓扑和几何两个角度提出探针：互邻域度量（Mutual Neighborhood Metric）用于衡量特征邻域与空间拓扑之间的对齐程度；庞加莱适配器（Poincaré Adapter）用于测试静态场景中隐空间位移对相机运动几何的线性可访问性。
AI.result: 实验表明，尽管自监督视觉模型原则上未经过直接3D监督或主动代理训练，但在正确探针下，其潜存子空间与三维欧氏空间呈现显著强相关性。
AI.conclusion: 基于上述洞察，本文提出一类"隐空间导航"技术，可在纯隐空间中完成视觉里程计与定位，从而绕过显式3D重建的步骤，为下游任务提供了新的范式。

title: XCT-SAM: Sequential Parameter-Efficient Domain Adaptation of SAM for Industrial XCT Defect Segmentation
comment: 10 pages, 7 figures, 3 tables. Accepted to the IAPR Workshop on Machine Vision for Industrial Inspection (MVI2), in conjunction with ICPR 2026. Code: https://github.com/Mahedi-61/XCT-SAM
summary: Defect segmentation in additive manufacturing (AM) X-ray computed tomography (XCT) images remains challenging due to severe class imbalance and large distribution shifts across scan conditions. Although recent foundation models such as the Segment Anything Model (SAM) provide strong general-purpose segmentation priors, their natural-image pre-training transfers poorly to the AM XCT domain, where defects appear as subtle non-semantic microstructural anomalies. Moreover, adapting SAM to the AM domain is further limited by the large domain gap and scarcity of labeled real XCT data. We present XCT-SAM, a sequential parameter-efficient adaptation framework for AM XCT defect segmentation. Instead of adapting SAM directly from natural images to XCT data, we first fine-tune Conv-LoRA adapters on an alloy-microstructure dataset and subsequently transfer the adapted model to XCT images, progressively bridging the domain gap. Using Conv-LoRA adapters with rank r=2, the framework injects convolutional spatial inductive bias into SAM's backbone while training approximately 4.15M parameters and keeping over 99% of the model frozen. We evaluate XCT-SAM on out-of-distribution CycleGAN-XCT benchmarks and real-world NIST XCT scans. Across both settings, XCT-SAM consistently outperforms zero-shot SAM and other domain-adapted SAM baselines, achieving the best overall IoU and Dice scores. These results demonstrate the effectiveness of intermediate domain adaptation with parameter-efficient adapters for industrial XCT defect segmentation. The source code is publicly available at https://github.com/Mahedi-61/XCT-SAM.git

AI.tldr: 提出XCT-SAM框架，通过中间域合金微结构数据集上的参数高效微调（Conv-LoRA）逐步弥合自然图像与工业XCT图像之间的域差距，在严重类别不平衡和分布偏移条件下显著提升了增材制造XCT图像中缺陷分割的性能。
AI.motivation: 增材制造XCT图像中的缺陷分割面临严重的类别不平衡和跨扫描条件的分布偏移问题；虽然SAM等基础模型具有强大的通用分割能力，但其在自然图像上的预训练无法很好地迁移到AM XCT领域，因为缺陷表现为微弱的非语义微观结构异常，且标注的真实XCT数据稀缺。
AI.method: 提出XCT-SAM序列化参数高效适配框架：首先在合金微结构数据集上微调Conv-LoRA适配器（秩r=2），然后将适配后的模型迁移到XCT图像上，逐步弥合域差距；Conv-LoRA在SAM骨干网络中注入卷积空间归纳偏置，仅训练约415万参数（冻结超过99%的模型参数）。
AI.result: 在分布外CycleGAN-XCT基准和真实NIST XCT扫描数据上评估，XCT-SAM在所有设置下均一致优于零样本SAM和其他域适配SAM基线，取得了最佳的整体IoU和Dice分数。
AI.conclusion: 中间域适配结合参数高效适配器可有效解决工业XCT缺陷分割中的域差距问题，为在标注数据稀缺领域应用基础模型提供了一种可行的渐进式迁移策略。

title: SD-MAR: Multi-image Analytical Reasoning via Synthetic Data and Reinforcement Learning
summary: Vision Language Models (VLMs) demonstrate strong perceptual abilities but remain limited in tasks requiring analytical reasoning across multiple visual states, such as multi-image comparison, change detection, and multi-step visual inference. These capabilities are critical for real-world multimodal applications where reasoning must be grounded in systematic differences between visual contexts. However, existing benchmarks rarely require both explicit visual comparison and analytical reasoning, leaving this capability underexplored. To address this gap, we introduce SD-MAR (Synthetic Data for Multi-image Analytical Reasoning), a framework for training and evaluating VLMs on multi-image analytical reasoning. SD-MAR constructs paired visual scenarios through controlled perturbations and generates reasoning tasks spanning semantic change attribution and quantitative comparison. We further train VLMs using GRPO-lite with Backward Discounted Allocation (BDA), a reinforcement learning approach that removes KL regularization to encourage stronger policy optimization while allocating greater credit to the later reasoning steps where analytical conclusions are formed. Experiments on Qwen2.5-VL-7B and InternVL3-8B show that GRPO-lite fine-tuning on SD-MAR improves in-domain accuracy by up to 36.95%, with Qwen2.5-VL-7B outperforming GPT-4.1 on the SD-MAR benchmark. Importantly, out-of-domain generalization is preserved or improved: performance remains within 1% on MME, MMMU-Pro, and MathVista, while improving by up to 4% on MMBench. LLM-as-judge evaluation further demonstrates consistent improvements in logical coherence and explanation quality across both models.

AI.tldr: 本文提出SD-MAR框架，通过受控扰动生成多图像分析推理数据，并结合GRPO-lite与后向折扣分配（BDA）强化学习方法训练视觉语言模型，在提升多图像分析推理能力的同时保持或改善通用性能。
AI.motivation: 现有视觉语言模型（VLM）在需要跨多幅图像进行比较分析、变化检测和多步视觉推理的任务中表现有限，而现有基准测试很少同时要求显式的视觉比较与分析推理，导致该能力未被充分探索。
AI.method: 本文提出SD-MAR（Synthetic Data for Multi-image Analytical Reasoning）框架，通过受控扰动构造成对视觉场景，生成涵盖语义变化归因与定量比较的推理任务；并提出GRPO-lite与后向折扣分配（BDA）相结合的强化学习方法，移除KL正则化以增强策略优化，并将更多信用分配给后续分析结论形成的推理步骤。
AI.result: 在Qwen2.5-VL-7B和InternVL3-8B上的实验表明，基于SD-MAR的GRPO-lite微调在域内准确率上提升高达36.95%，其中Qwen2.5-VL-7B在SD-MAR基准上超越GPT-4.1；域外泛化性能保持或提升，在MME、MMMU-Pro和MathVista上波动在1%以内，在MMBench上提升达4%；LLM-as-judge评估显示两模型在逻辑连贯性和解释质量上均有持续改善。
AI.conclusion: SD-MAR框架有效弥补了VLM在多图像分析推理能力上的缺失，GRPO-lite与BDA方法在强化推理能力的同时未损害通用性能，为提升VLM在真实多模态应用中系统化视觉比较与推理能力提供了可行路径。

title: RegNetAgents: A Multi-Agent Framework for Cross-Network Regulatory Driver Identification in Cancer Genomics
summary: We introduce RegNetAgents, an AI-oriented multi-agent framework for structured, query-driven regulatory candidate identification across heterogeneous gene regulatory networks. The system enables unified analysis of bulk tumor and single-cell-derived ARACNe networks by integrating TCGA-derived cancer networks with large-scale single-cell regulatory networks from the GREmLN project. For a given focal gene, the framework performs dual-network classification, cancer gene filtering using OncoKB annotations, and mode-of-action (MoA) assignment for tumor-derived regulatory relationships. Candidates are ranked by evidence consistency across networks (Both, TCGA-only, GREmLN-only). The system is implemented as a multi-agent LangGraph DAG workflow, accessible through a unified Python API and Model Context Protocol (MCP) client, operating as a downstream analytical layer over precomputed regulatory networks rather than a network inference method. Across eleven breast cancer (BRCA) and twelve colorectal cancer (COAD) focal genes, RegNetAgents identifies candidate regulators significantly enriched for OncoKB-annotated cancer genes. TCGA-derived candidates show strong enrichment (Stouffer Z = 6.69 for BRCA and 6.95 for COAD), while GREmLN-derived candidates also demonstrate significant enrichment (Z = 5.51 for BRCA and 7.06 for COAD; all p < 0.0001). No enrichment is observed in housekeeping or non-driver control gene sets, supporting signal specificity. An extended module enables structured evaluation of oncogenic potential, druggability, clinical relevance, and network vulnerability, supporting end-to-end interpretation from candidate identification to biological hypothesis generation. RegNetAgents establishes an interpretable AI framework for cross-network regulatory candidate identification in cancer genomics.

AI.tldr: RegNetAgents是一个基于多智能体的AI框架，用于在异质基因调控网络中进行结构化、查询驱动的调控候选基因识别，通过对来自TCGA和GREmLN项目的网络进行统一分析，实现了从候选识别到生物学假设生成的端到端可解释流程。
AI.motivation: 现有癌症基因组学研究缺乏一个统一的、可解释的AI框架，能够跨异质基因调控网络（如bulk肿瘤和单细胞来源的ARACNe网络）进行结构化、查询驱动的调控候选基因识别，并支持从候选识别到生物学解释的端到端分析。
AI.method: 系统集成了TCGA来源的bulk肿瘤癌症网络与GREmLN项目的大规模单细胞调控网络，针对目标基因执行双网络分类、基于OncoKB注释的癌症基因过滤以及调控关系的作用模式（MoA）分配，并按跨网络的证据一致性（Both、TCGA-only、GREmLN-only）对候选基因排序；系统实现为多智能体LangGraph DAG工作流，提供统一Python API和MCP客户端，作为预计算调控网络的下游分析层而非网络推断方法。
AI.result: 在11个乳腺癌和12个结直肠癌目标基因上，RegNetAgents识别的候选调控因子显著富集于OncoKB注释的癌症基因：TCGA来源候选基因富集显著（BRCA: Stouffer Z=6.69; COAD: Z=6.95），GREmLN来源候选基因同样显著（BRCA: Z=5.51; COAD: Z=7.06, 均p<0.0001），而看家基因和非驱动对照基因集未观察到富集，表明信号具有特异性。
AI.conclusion: RegNetAgents建立了一个可解释的AI框架，能够跨网络识别癌症基因组学中的调控候选基因，并通过扩展模块支持致癌潜力、药物可及性、临床相关性和网络脆弱性的结构化评估，从而将候选识别与生物学假设生成有机结合，为癌症调控机制研究提供了端到端的可解释分析工具。

title: Emergent Region-Level Facial Correspondence in Frozen Vision Foundation Models
summary: Frozen self-supervised vision models can align parts of generic objects, but it remains unclear whether this correspondence extends to human faces, where global layout is shared while identity-specific appearance varies sharply. We test whether frozen DINOv3 features define a region-level facial coordinate system: a feature space in which eyes, brows, nose, mouth, skin, and hair remain distinguishable across people and across time without face-specific training. Using DINOv3 ViT-L/16 patch embeddings and FaRL only as a face-part labeling interface, we evaluate cross-identity nearest-neighbor matching and temporal label propagation on 200 CelebDF-v2 real videos. DINOv3 achieves 83.0% region-level semantic accuracy under unconstrained cross-identity matching, compared with a 23.0% area-weighted random baseline, and 95.5% temporal tracking accuracy without a learned temporal module. A no-FaRL control collapses to 0.9%, showing that FaRL supplies semantic initialization while DINOv3 supplies dense spatial correspondence. The strongest correspondence appears at an intermediate layer: block 18 gives a 4.93x same-region versus cross-region discrimination ratio, compared with 1.48x at the final block. Against CLIP ViT-L/14, DINOv3 shows only a small aggregate advantage but a +16.8 pp gain on anatomical regions, indicating that image-level contrastive supervision captures coarse facial layout but not fine-grained anatomical identity. These results establish frozen DINOv3 as a strong zero-shot representation for region-level facial correspondence and identify intermediate self-supervised features as the most useful layer for dense face analysis.

AI.tldr: 本文证明冻结的DINOv3自监督视觉特征无需人脸特定训练即可建立跨身份、跨时间的区域级人脸对应关系，在中间层（block 18）达到最强空间判别力，为密集人脸分析提供了零样本表示。
AI.motivation: 尽管冻结的自监督视觉模型已在通用物体上展现出部件对齐能力，但人脸具有全局布局共享而身份外观剧烈变化的特点，现有研究尚未明确这类特征是否能在此场景下建立细粒度的区域级对应关系。
AI.method: 采用DINOv3 ViT-L/16的patch嵌入作为核心特征，仅将FaRL作为人脸部件标注接口（用于语义初始化），不进行任何人脸特定微调；在200个CelebDF-v2真实视频上评估跨身份最近邻匹配和时序标签传播性能，并通过移除FaRL的控制实验及不同层级的特征对比分析对应机制。
AI.result: DINOv3在无约束跨身份匹配下达到83.0%的区域级语义准确率（随机基线23.0%），时序跟踪准确率达95.5%且无需时序模块；移除FaRL后准确率骤降至0.9%；中间层（block 18）的同区域与跨区域判别比达4.93x，远超最终层的1.48x；相比CLIP ViT-L/14，DINOv3整体优势微弱但在解剖区域上高出16.8个百分点。
AI.conclusion: 冻结的DINOv3可作为人脸区域级对应的强零样本表示，且中间层自监督特征比最终层更适合密集人脸分析；图像级对比监督（如CLIP）虽能捕获粗糙面部布局但缺乏精细解剖对应能力。

title: Enhancing Small Language Models Reasoning through Knowledge Graph Grounding
comment: Presented at the 2nd Causal Neuro-symbolic Artificial Intelligence (Causal NeSy): Toward Agentic LLMs with Neuro-Symbolic and Graph Based Reasoning Workshop @ ESWC2026
summary: Although large language models (LLMs) have set benchmarks for zero-shot reasoning, their deployment remains cost-prohibitive and environmentally taxing. Small Language Models (SLMs) offer a sustainable alternative, but prone to errors, on tasks requiring complex, multi-hop logical grounding. We investigate a neuro-symbolic agentic framework to enhance the reasoning capabilities of SLMs, specifically Gemma 3 (1B, 4B) and Llama 3.2 (3B), using the CLUTRR kinship benchmark. Our approach transforms the SLM into a minimalist agent utilizing two specialized tool calls: extract_facts for symbolic triplet extraction and get_hint for expert reasoning via a Relational Graph Convolutional Network (RGCN). We evaluate these models across two configurations, both in an Oracle scenario with ground-truth triplets and a Realistic scenario relying on self-extracted knowledge. Our results reveal that while RGCN-derived hints provide a 1.5 - 2x performance gain over story-only baselines, the system is constrained by the extraction bottleneck and sequential deductive fragility, where early extraction errors compound over multi-hop chains. Furthermore, we identify a "distraction effect" in specific architectures where noisy, self-generated facts degrade performance despite the presence of expert hints. This work characterizes the challenges of symbolic grounding in low-resource agentic systems and provides a roadmap for iterative verification in neuro-symbolic agentic pipelines.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种神经符号智能体框架，利用RGCN专家提示增强小语言模型在多跳推理任务上的能力，实验表明该方法在理想条件下可带来1.5-2倍的性能提升，但受限于符号提取瓶颈和顺序演绎脆弱性，且特定架构下存在自生成事实的"干扰效应"。
AI.motivation: 大语言模型在零样本推理上表现优异，但部署成本高昂且环境负担大；小语言模型虽为可持续替代方案，但在需要复杂多跳逻辑推理的任务上容易出错，亟需提升其推理能力的有效方法。
AI.method: 本文采用神经符号智能体框架，将小语言模型（Gemma 3 1B/4B、Llama 3.2 3B）转化为极简智能体，配备两个专用工具调用：extract_facts用于符号三元组提取，get_hint通过关系图卷积网络提供专家推理提示。在CLUTRR亲属关系基准上评估Oracle（真实三元组）和Realistic（自提取知识）两种配置。
AI.result: RGCN推导的专家提示相比仅基于故事描述的基线方法可实现1.5-2倍的性能提升；但系统受限于提取瓶颈和顺序演绎脆弱性，早期提取错误会在多跳推理链中累积放大；特定架构下出现了"干扰效应"，即嘈杂的自生成事实即便有专家提示仍会降低性能。
AI.conclusion: 本研究揭示了低资源智能体系统中符号基础化的关键挑战，包括提取瓶颈、顺序演绎脆弱性和干扰效应，为神经符号智能体流水线中的迭代验证机制提供了发展路线图。

title: Just Keep Prompting: Evaluating Repetitive Socratic Prompting in VLMs
summary: Deploying Vision-Language Models (VLMs) in real-world settings requires not only strong visual reasoning but also stability under sustained conversational pressure. We introduce Just Keep Prompting (JKP), a multi-turn evaluation framework that measures VLM epistemic stability when users repeatedly challenge, question, or contradict a model's answer. JKP probes models for up to 10 follow-up turns using three strategies: Adversarial Negation (repeated rejection), Pure Socratic Interrogation (repeated calls to reassess certainty), and Context-Aware Socratic Summarization (reflecting the model's prior rationale back before asking for reconsideration). We evaluate GPT-4o, Gemini 2.5 Pro, and Qwen3-VL-30B on a subset of the STAR benchmark across 720 multi-turn runs. Aggregate accuracy changes modestly from Turn 0 to Turn 10, but trajectory-level analysis reveals substantial instability: correct answers regress, wrong answers recover, and many runs exhibit repeated answer flipping. Repeated prompting has bounded upside and often acts as a destabilizer rather than a reasoning aid. The effect is strongly model-dependent: Qwen3-VL-30B achieves the highest final accuracy but becomes confidently wrong under direct contradiction; Gemini 2.5 Pro is comparatively stable but token-expensive; GPT-4o is the most brittle and oscillatory. These findings reveal that multi-turn VLM evaluation captures not just additional reasoning but pressure-response profiles: how models trade off visual grounding, calibration, and conversational compliance under repeated challenge.

AI.tldr: 本文提出JKP（Just Keep Prompting）多轮评估框架，用于衡量视觉语言模型（VLM）在用户持续挑战、质疑或反驳下的认知稳定性。实验发现，多轮提示会显著破坏模型输出的稳定性，导致正确答案倒退、错误答案恢复和答案反复翻转，且不同模型表现出截然不同的压力响应特征。
AI.motivation: 现有VLM评估主要关注单轮视觉推理能力，忽略了实际部署中用户会反复挑战、质疑或反驳模型回答的场景。缺乏衡量模型在持续会话压力下认知稳定性的标准化评估方法。
AI.method: JKP框架设计三种多轮干预策略：对抗性否定（反复拒绝模型答案）、纯粹苏格拉底式质询（反复要求重新评估确定性）和上下文感知苏格拉底式总结（先回显模型先前推理再请求重新考虑）。在STAR基准子集上对GPT-4o、Gemini 2.5 Pro和Qwen3-VL-30B进行720次多轮运行评估，每轮最多10次追问。
AI.result: 聚合准确率从第0轮到第10轮变化不大，但轨迹级分析显示严重的不稳定性：正确答案发生倒退、错误答案出现恢复、许多运行出现答案反复翻转。多轮提示的收益有限，更多是作为不稳定因素而非推理辅助。效果强烈依赖模型：Qwen3-VL-30B最终准确率最高但在直接反驳下自信地犯错；Gemini 2.5 Pro相对稳定但token消耗大；GPT-4o最为脆弱和振荡。
AI.conclusion: 多轮VLM评估捕捉的不仅是额外推理能力，更是模型的压力响应特征——即模型在反复挑战下如何在视觉基础、校准能力和对话遵从性之间进行权衡。这为VLM在实际部署中的鲁棒性评估提供了新的维度。

title: VTM-Nav: Hierarchical Visual-Topological Memory for Cross-Episode Object-Goal Navigation
summary: Object-goal navigation requires an embodied agent to locate and reach an instance of a specified object category in an indoor environment. Recent training-free approaches leverage vision-language models (VLMs) for open-vocabulary semantic reasoning, but are typically evaluated under an episodic protocol that resets all scene-specific state after each episode. We introduce Cross-Episode Object-Goal Navigation, in which an agent repeatedly operates in the same scene, retains only self-acquired experience, and keeps its model parameters fixed. To support experience reuse, we present \method, a training-free VLM navigation framework with a persistent hierarchical Visual-Topological Memory (VTM). The VTM organizes scene knowledge at room and object levels and retrieves relevant experience through coarse-to-fine matching, providing memory as soft guidance only when it agrees with current observations. A conservative execution guard further mitigates oscillations, blocked motions, and premature stopping. Under a controlled same-scene protocol, we evaluate \method{} on three benchmarks, HM3D v0.1, HM3D v0.2, and MP3D, and compare it with a strengthened WMNav baseline augmented with cross-episode textual memory, while keeping the VLM backbone and action pipeline identical. \method{} achieves the best performance across all three benchmarks, demonstrating the effectiveness and robustness of structured visual-topological experience reuse across datasets.

AI.tldr: 本文提出跨片段物体导航任务及其训练无关的VLM框架VTM，通过持久化层级视觉-拓扑记忆在场景中跨片段复用经验，在HM3D和MP3D基准上取得最优性能。
AI.motivation: 现有训练无关的VLM导航方法在开放词汇物体导航中表现良好，但均采用逐片段重置场景状态的标准评测协议，无法利用同一场景中跨片段的经验积累；当前缺乏既能保持模型参数固定又能复用自获取经验的机制。
AI.method: 提出跨片段物体导航任务及训练无关的VLM框架VTM，核心组件为持久化层级视觉-拓扑记忆（VTM），按房间级和物体级组织场景知识并通过粗到细匹配检索相关经验；仅在记忆与当前观测一致时提供软引导，并引入保守执行守卫来缓解振荡、阻塞和过早停止问题。
AI.result: 在HM3D v0.1、HM3D v0.2和MP3D三个基准上，VTM在所有数据集上均取得最优性能，超越了配备跨片段文本记忆的强化版WMNav基线，且VLM骨干和动作管线保持一致。
AI.conclusion: 结构化视觉-拓扑经验跨片段复用机制在多个数据集上展现出有效性和鲁棒性，为训练无关导航模型在持续同场景任务中的经验积累提供了可行范式。

title: Orchestrating Power Grid Studies with Multi-Agent AI and MCP Servers
summary: This position paper explores how Agentic AI and Model Context Protocol (MCP) can support power-grid studies in a Transmission System Operator (TSO) context. We focus on integrating Large Language Models with numerical simulation tools, structured workflows, and human supervision. We identify key industrial requirements for agent assisted grid studies and introduce pypowsybl-mcp, an MCP-based interface exposing selected capabilities of our simulation tool, pypowsybl to AI agents. This first step provides a testbed to study how agents can setup simulations, execute analyses, retrieve results, and interact with power-system simulators through standardized tool calls. We also discuss principles for human-in-the-loop, multi-agent workflows and outline an evaluation strategy combining technical metrics and practitioner feedback. The paper positions MCP-based tool integration as a step toward more interactive, auditable, and scalable grid-study environments.

AI.tldr: 本文探讨了Agentic AI与模型上下文协议（MCP）在输电系统运营商（TSO）电网研究中的应用，提出了pypowsybl-mcp接口，通过标准化工具调用将大语言模型与数值仿真工具、结构化工作流及人类监督相结合，旨在构建更交互、可审计且可扩展的电网研究环境。
AI.motivation: 当前电力系统研究中，AI代理缺乏与工业级数值仿真工具的标准接口，难以实现自动化仿真设置、分析执行和结果检索的闭环，且现有方案在工业可信度、可审计性和人机协作方面存在不足，无法满足TSO对电网研究的严格工业要求。
AI.method: 论文提出了pypowsybl-mcp接口，基于模型上下文协议（MCP）将电力仿真工具pypowsybl的选定功能暴露给AI代理，支持通过标准化工具调用来设置仿真、执行分析并检索结果；同时设计了包含人类监督的多代理工作流原则，并提出了结合技术指标与从业者反馈的评估策略。
AI.result: pypowsybl-mcp提供了一个可直接用于研究Agent与电力系统仿真器交互的试验平台，支持AI代理通过MCP协议标准化地调用仿真工具能力；论文识别了TSO场景下代理辅助电网研究的工业需求，并初步验证了MCP作为工具集成中间件的可行性。
AI.conclusion: 基于MCP的工具集成方法是构建交互式、可审计且可扩展的电网研究环境的关键步骤，为未来AI代理辅助电力系统分析提供了标准化接口范式，有助于推动大语言模型在工业级电力工程中的可信落地。

title: LBA: Textual Hard-Label Adversarial Attack under Low Query Budgets
summary: Generating high-quality adversarial texts with low query budgets remains a challenging problem in the hard-label scenario. Most existing approaches rely on greedy algorithms, where one position in the text is selected for substitution, followed by the substitutions of other positions. This local search approach may fail to discover high-quality adversarial examples and often leads to excessive query costs. Ideally, an optimal adversarial sample would consider all possible position combinations in the text, but exhaustive search is computationally impractical. To address this challenge, we propose a sampling-based method called LBA, which constructs an approximate distribution of high-quality adversarial examples by integrating both prior and posterior knowledge, and utilizes this distribution for sampling. As sampling progresses, posterior knowledge updates the approximate distribution, which in turn guides more effective sampling. Extensive experiments on six language models, ranging from small-scale to large-scale architectures across four datasets, demonstrate that LBA significantly outperforms state-of-the-art baselines on all evaluation metrics. Additionally, LLM-based assessment indicates that LBA generates more semantically preserved and comprehensible adversarial texts.

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于采样的硬标签对抗文本生成方法LBA，通过构建融合先验和后验知识的近似分布来指导高质量对抗样本的采样，在六种语言模型上显著优于现有基线方法。
AI.motivation: 现有硬标签场景下的对抗文本生成方法多依赖贪婪算法，每次只替换一个位置再进行后续替换，这种局部搜索策略难以发现高质量的对抗样本，且往往导致过高的查询成本。理想的最优对抗样本需要考虑文本中所有可能的位置组合，但穷举搜索在计算上不可行。
AI.method: 提出一种基于采样的方法LBA，通过整合先验知识和后验知识来构建高质量对抗样本的近似分布，并利用该分布进行采样。随着采样过程的进行，后验知识不断更新近似分布，从而引导更有效的采样，实现了一种迭代式的采样-更新机制。
AI.result: 在四个数据集上对六种从小规模到大规模的语言模型进行的广泛实验表明，LBA在所有评估指标上均显著优于现有最先进的基线方法。基于LLM的评估进一步表明，LBA生成的对抗文本具有更好的语义保留性和可理解性。
AI.conclusion: LBA通过采样策略有效解决了硬标签对抗文本生成中局部搜索的局限性，在降低查询成本的同时生成了更高质量的对抗样本，且生成的文本在语义保留和可理解性方面表现更优，为硬标签场景下的对抗攻击提供了新的有效范式。

title: 3D Geometric Tooth Alignment Planning via Deep Reinforcement Learning
summary: 3D geometric tooth alignment planning, which determines sequential trajectories from initial malocclusion to the final target alignment, is a cornerstone of modern digital orthodontics. This paper presents a novel deep reinforcement learning (DRL) framework to automate the generation of these alignment paths. We formulate the planning process as a Markov Decision Process (MDP) to capture its sequential decision-making nature, focusing on optimizing geometric trajectories while integrating essential spatial constraints, such as inter-dental collision avoidance and path efficiency. The proposed method leverages the Deep Deterministic Policy Gradient (DDPG) algorithm, enhanced by three key innovations: (1) a Transformer-based agent to model complex spatial interactions between teeth and manage high-dimensional state-action spaces; (2) a dynamic masking scheme that restricts movement to a sparse subset of teeth per step, better reflecting the clinical logic of sequential alignment; and (3) a two-stage curriculum learning strategy that gradually increases task difficulty to ensure training stability and efficient path discovery. We evaluate our approach on a dataset of 10K expert-designed treatment plans based on clinical data. Experimental results demonstrate that our method outperforms existing baselines in terms of path safety and geometric efficiency, providing a robust and automated solution for 3D geometric orthodontic alignment planning.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于深度强化学习（DRL）的3D牙齿正畸排齐路径规划框架，将排齐过程建模为马尔可夫决策过程（MDP），利用改进的DDPG算法（集成Transformer智能体、动态掩码机制和两阶段课程学习）在10K临床数据集上实现了优于基线方法的路径安全性和几何效率。
AI.motivation: 现有数字正畸中的3D牙齿排齐路径规划依赖人工专家设计，缺乏自动化的方案来生成从初始错颌到最终目标排齐的优化轨迹，且需要同时满足碰撞避免和路径效率等空间约束。
AI.method: 该方法将牙齿排齐路径规划建模为马尔可夫决策过程（MDP），采用DDPG算法作为基础强化学习框架，并提出三项关键创新：基于Transformer的智能体以建模牙齿间复杂空间交互并处理高维状态-动作空间；动态掩码机制，每步仅限制一稀疏子集牙齿运动以模拟临床排齐逻辑；两阶段课程学习策略，逐步提升任务难度以保证训练稳定性和高效路径发现。
AI.result: 在基于临床数据的10K专家设计方案数据集上，该方法在路径安全性和几何效率方面均优于现有基线方法，证明其作为3D几何正畸排齐规划的鲁棒自动化方案的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 本文展示了一种完全自动化的DRL框架能够有效解决传统依赖专家经验的3D牙齿排齐路径规划问题，通过结合Transformer、动态掩码和课程学习等机制，在保证临床约束的前提下实现了更优的路径规划性能，为正畸治疗计划的自动化提供了有力工具。

title: When a Verified World Model Still Loses: Play-Adequacy vs Prediction-Accuracy in LLM-Synthesized Code World Models
comment: 41 pages, 4 figures. Code and reproduction log: https://github.com/JaviMaligno/code-world-models
summary:
Large language models can synthesize a game's rules as executable code - a Code World Model (CWM) - which a classical planner then searches over. Such models are typically accepted when they reach high transition accuracy on sampled trajectories. We argue this is the wrong notion of adequacy for planning.
  We show four things. (1) An LLM-synthesized CWM can pass a sampling gate at 100% transition accuracy and be $\geq 98\%$ state-accurate on the planner's own search distribution, yet lose systematically at play, because the $<1\%$ it gets wrong is exactly the pivotal dynamics; the play cost of the omitted rule is $0.091$ (seed-clustered 95% CI $[0.065,0.117]$, $n=4800$). We call this the verified-vs-correct gap, and confirm it end-to-end through the synthesis pipeline. (2) The harm follows a quantitative law, $\mathrm{danger}=\mathrm{play\_cost}\times(1-\mathrm{rarity})^N$, whose $(1-\mathrm{rarity})^N$ gate-miss factor is proven exact and whose play cost is empirically bounded. (3) The failure is not repaired by more data: LLM synthesis behaves as rule translation, not rule inference, and did not infer the omitted rule across models (GPT-5.x) and data regimes (including DAgger and targeted examples). (4) The same mechanism recurs on the belief-inference function of imperfect-information CWMs: we prove a coverage bound (a size-$N$ gate is identifying when $N\gtrsim b^{d_{\max}}$), explaining why shallow games such as Kuhn poker show no gap, and hand-construct Beacon, a verified-but-wrong inference function that passes the gate yet loses every game.
  These results suggest adequacy for planning-oriented world models should be measured on the search distribution or by play directly, not by prediction accuracy on sampled transitions.

AI.tldr: 本文证明，基于LLM合成的代码世界模型在采样轨迹上达到100%的转移准确率和≥98%的状态准确率，仍可能因遗漏关键动力学规则而在规划中系统性失败，揭示了"验证正确但实际错误"的差距，并指出规划导向的世界模型应基于搜索分布或直接通过游戏表现来评估，而非采样数据的预测精度。
AI.motivation: 现有研究通常以LLM合成世界模型在采样轨迹上的高转移准确率作为其规划适用性的标准，但本文质疑这一评估准则的充分性，指出该指标无法捕捉模型在规划搜索分布上因遗漏关键动力学规则而导致的系统性失败。
AI.method: 本文通过端到端合成管线构建Code World Model，使用经典规划器进行搜索，对比了在采样轨迹上的转移准确率与规划器实际搜索分布上的状态准确率，并设计了量化指标"游戏代价"（play cost）和"危险性"（danger = play_cost × (1 - rarity)^N）来刻画遗漏规则的危害；同时在不完全信息设定下分析了信念推断函数的覆盖界。
AI.result: LLM合成的CWM在采样门控上达到100%转移准确率和≥98%状态准确率，但遗漏的关键规则导致游戏代价为0.091（95% CI [0.065,0.117]）；该失败遵循定量规律 danger = play_cost × (1 - rarity)^N；增加数据和模型规模（GPT-5.x、DAgger）未能修复该问题；在不完全信息博弈中，覆盖界证明只有当N≳b^{d_max}时门控才有效，浅层博弈（如Kuhn扑克）无此差距。
AI.conclusion: 规划导向的世界模型的充分性不应以采样轨迹上的预测准确率衡量，而应基于搜索分布或直接通过实际游戏表现来评估；LLM在规则合成中表现为规则翻译而非规则推断，这是"验证正确但实际错误"差距的根本原因。

title: Latent Communication Between Language Model Agents: Channels, Alignment, and the Limits of Text
summary: Multi-agent systems (MAS) are utilized in many contexts and many professions. Those MAS rely on inter-agent communication, usually implemented by clear-text message passing. We hypothesize that Large Language Models may have a world model at their disposal that exceeds expressibility in text when complex concepts need to be communicated. Our aim is to approach a proof of this hypothesis with structured experiments. In this work, we show that LLM agents communicating via text lose information, which we quantify via Sparse Autoencoder (SAE) feature analysis. We construct three communication channels and measure concept-discriminating information in each. We first show that the SAE-sparse channel retains a 99.4% probe accuracy at 28-fold compression over the dense-latent channel vs 80.4% for the text channel. We then proceed to examine the same for cross-architecture communication by using sparse latent space alignment. We find for Procrustes alignment a 92% top-1 retrieval between Llama and Mistral. Using a text round-trip, we perform feature survival analysis to find that text serialization destroys 88% of SAE features, replacing them with a different feature set. We attribute the loss to identity replacement, not attenuation. By our analysis, we were able to attribute a 3-10pp performance penalty to the linear Procrustes alignment, improving with nonlinear alignment methods. In a task-level evaluation we find that the latent channel matches the text channel on cross-lingual concept tasks but never exceeds it. Text augmentation with latent features provides no benefit, leading us to negative conclusions for the initial hypothesis: lost features mostly or completely encode surface form, not task-relevant semantics. To pinpoint the practical advantage of latent communication over a text channel, deeper tasks eliciting complex concepts and an corresponding analysis framework are needed.

AI.tldr: 本文通过稀疏自编码器（SAE）特征分析，实证检验了LLM智能体间文本通信存在信息丢失，并探索了潜空间通信作为替代方案；研究发现文本序列化会破坏88%的SAE特征，且潜空间通信在跨语言概念任务中仅与文本通道持平，未能超越，从而否定了LLM拥有超越文本表达的潜在世界模型这一初始假设。
AI.motivation: 多智能体系统（MAS）依赖明文文本消息传递进行通信，但研究假设大型语言模型（LLM）可能拥有超越文本表达能力的内部世界模型，即复杂概念在文本通信中可能丢失信息；本文旨在通过结构化实验验证这一假设，量化文本通信中的信息损失程度。
AI.method: 构造三种通信通道（文本通道、密集潜变量通道、SAE稀疏通道），利用稀疏自编码器（SAE）特征分析量化概念区分性信息；采用Procrustes对齐等方法实现跨架构（Llama与Mistral）稀疏潜空间对齐，通过文本往返（text round-trip）进行特征存活性分析，并评估线性和非线性对齐方法的性能差异。
AI.result: SAE稀疏通道在28倍压缩下仍保持99.4%的探针准确率，远超文本通道的80.4%；跨架构Procrustes对齐实现了92%的top-1检索率；文本序列化破坏了88%的SAE特征，且损失源于特征身份替换而非衰减；线性Procrustes对齐引入3-10%的性能损失，非线性对齐有所改善；在任务层面，潜变量通道在跨语言概念任务中与文本通道持平但从未超越，文本与潜特征增强无收益。
AI.conclusion: 研究对初始假设得出否定结论：丢失的SAE特征主要编码表面形式而非任务相关语义；潜空间通信相比文本通道缺乏实际优势，需要更深入的任务和对应的分析框架才能揭示潜通信的实际价值。

title: AdaTurn: Budget-Aware Test-Time Scaling for Active Visual Perception Agents
summary: Active visual agents solve fine-grained image tasks by interleaving reasoning with image-grounding actions across multiple turns. However, deployment-time rollout budgets are rarely fixed: some requests permit long rollouts, while others require the agent to act under a tight turn limit. Existing methods train the policy as if the rollout budget were hidden, so when the available budget is smaller than the trajectory the agent prefers, the interaction is often truncated before any valid answer is produced; we term this failure \emph{catastrophic truncation}. To overcome this challenge, we present AdaTurn, a budget-aware framework that conditions the agent on the allowed number of turns and explicitly trains the boundary behavior induced by the budget. Our key component, Forced-Answer DAPO (FA-DAPO), converts the over-budget event from a masked or penalized failure into a trainable final-decision step, teaching the model to synthesize partial evidence when further tool use is no longer possible. We further randomize rollout budgets during both training and inference and introduce a load-balanced scheduler that makes such operations practical. AdaTurn substantially improves low-budget accuracy, for example raising VisualProbe-Medium from 36.7% to 47.6% at four turns, while preserving strong scaling at larger budgets and transferring effectively to multiple backbones and general multimodal benchmarks.

AI.tldr: AdaTurn提出了一种预算感知框架，通过显式将允许的交互轮次作为条件输入策略，并引入Forced-Answer DAPO将超预算事件转化为可训练的最后决策步骤，有效解决了活跃视觉智能体在部署时因预算不足而导致的灾难性截断问题，在低预算场景下显著提升了准确率。
AI.motivation: 活跃视觉智能体在执行细粒度图像任务时需要多轮推理与图像定位操作，但部署时的交互预算（允许的轮次上限）并不固定；现有方法将策略训练视为预算未知，导致当可用预算小于智能体偏好的轨迹长度时，交互被截断且无法产生有效答案，即灾难性截断问题。
AI.method: 提出AdaTurn预算感知框架，核心组件为Forced-Answer DAPO（FA-DAPO），它将超预算事件从被掩码或惩罚的失败状态转化为可训练的最后决策步骤，使模型学会在无法进一步使用工具时基于部分证据进行合成回答；此外在训练和推理过程中随机化预算，并引入负载均衡调度器使其可行。
AI.result: AdaTurn显著提升了低预算下的准确率，例如在VisualProbe-Medium任务上，4轮交互下将准确率从36.7%提升至47.6%，同时在高预算下保持良好扩展性，并能有效迁移到多种骨干网络和通用多模态基准上。
AI.conclusion: 该研究揭示了将预算条件显式纳入策略训练对于构建鲁棒活跃视觉智能体的重要性，FA-DAPO将截断事件转变为可学习步骤的设计为预算受限场景下的智能体部署提供了有效范式，且方法具有良好的跨骨干和跨任务迁移能力。

title: ReasFlow: Assisting Reasoning-Centric Scientific Discovery in Applied Mathematics via a Knowledge-Based Multi-Agent System
summary: Recent advances in Large Language Models have fueled autonomous AI agents capable of tackling complex scientific tasks, yet existing automated research systems remain predominantly focused on empirically driven domains with quantitative benchmarks, leaving theory-driven discovery, particularly in mathematically grounded disciplines requiring rigorous proofs and synthesis of domain knowledge, largely underexplored. Key challenges include the difficulty of verifying theoretical reasoning at scale, insufficient reasoning ability for autonomous frontier exploration, and a scarcity of procedural heuristics in the literature. We introduce ReasFlow, an end-to-end autonomous agent system for reasoning-centric scientific discovery that operationalizes a collaborative paradigm where the human expert acts as Principal Investigator while the agent executes rigorous derivations as a capable graduate student. ReasFlow incorporates (i) a robust internal verification loop that audits logical coherence and corrects fundamental errors prior to human inspection, and (ii) an automated knowledge retrieval and self-improvement mechanism that proactively surfaces both declarative facts and overlooked procedural heuristics, substantially reducing expert intervention. The system unifies literature synthesis, algorithm design, theorem proving, experimentation, and manuscript preparation in a single system. Deployed to autonomously generate five complete research papers with rigorous theoretical and empirical content from minimal prompts, ReasFlow consistently achieves the highest evaluation scores among state-of-the-art open-access baselines under a curated LLM-based review rubric. ReasFlow is publicly accessible via the ReasLab platform, providing a collaborative workspace for AI-assisted theoretical research. Github repo: https://github.com/ReasLab/ReasFlow.git.

AI.tldr: ReasFlow是一个端到端自主推理智能体系统，专为以理论驱动的科学发现设计，通过人类专家（首席研究员）与智能体（研究生级推导者）的协作范式，结合内部逻辑验证循环与自动化知识检索及自我改进机制，实现了从文献综合到论文撰写的全流程自动化，在基于LLM的评审标准下取得了最高评价分数。
AI.motivation: 现有自动化科研系统主要面向经验驱动领域与定量基准测试，难以应用于理论驱动型科学发现，尤其是在需要严格证明与领域知识综合的数学化领域；关键挑战包括理论推理的大规模验证困难、自主前沿探索的推理能力不足以及文献中过程性启发式知识的稀缺。
AI.method: ReasFlow采用协作范式，人类专家担任首席研究员（Principal Investigator），智能体担任研究生级推导者（capable graduate student）；系统包含两个核心模块：一是内部验证循环（internal verification loop），在人工审查前审计逻辑连贯性并纠正基础性错误；二是自动化知识检索与自我改进机制，主动提取陈述性事实与被忽视的过程性启发式知识，显著减少专家干预；系统统一集成了文献综合、算法设计、定理证明、实验和论文撰写全流程。
AI.result: ReasFlow从极简提示词出发，自主生成了五篇包含严格理论与实验内容的完整研究论文；在基于LLM的评审标准下，ReasFlow在所有最新的开源基线方法中持续获得了最高评估分数；系统已通过ReasLab平台公开提供。
AI.conclusion: ReasFlow验证了将人类专业判断与自主推理验证相结合的范式能够有效推动理论驱动的科学发现自动化；其内部逻辑验证与知识检索改进机制为应对理论推理的可扩展验证与启发式知识缺失等核心挑战提供了可行方案；该系统的公开可用性为AI辅助理论研究的协作生态奠定了基础。

title: Eta Given Delta: Defining LLM Tool Efficiency With Marginal Tool Utility
summary: This paper introduces tool efficiency, a new quantitative metric to evaluate the rate of useful tool calls in an LLM agent trajectory. To ensure that tool efficiency is well-defined, we also introduce marginal tool utility, a new quantitative metric defined per tool call indicating whether a tool is useful or whether it can be safely removed from the tool suite without affecting accuracy while increasing tool efficiency; in this paper, we determine the sign of marginal tool utility for each tool call in a trajectory using LLM-as-a-Judge. While much prior work has been done to develop techniques that improve tool use by LLMs and design evaluation methods measuring efficiency indirectly using accuracy as a proxy, our work is centered on measuring efficiency directly via the quantitative metric proposed in this paper in post hoc trajectory analyses. It is our intention that this work contributes to the frontier of LLM evaluation research as a springboard for future benchmark designs and agent harness engineering (specifically with regards to creating lean tool suites) that optimize for metrics that complement but are distinct from accuracy.

AI.tldr: 本文提出工具效率（tool efficiency）和边际工具效用（marginal tool utility）两项量化指标，用于直接评估LLM智能体轨迹中有用工具调用的比例，旨在补充而非替代传统基于准确率的间接效率评估方法。
AI.motivation: 现有LLM工具使用研究多聚焦于提升工具调用能力或通过准确率间接衡量效率，缺乏直接量化工具调用效率的指标，导致无法精准判断工具套件中哪些工具调用是有用的、哪些可以安全移除，从而难以优化工具套件的精简性。
AI.method: 本文定义了工具效率（衡量轨迹中有用工具调用占比）和边际工具效用（逐工具调用判断是否对任务有用）两个量化指标；采用LLM-as-a-Judge方法自动为每个工具调用确定边际工具效用的正负符号，从而支持对智能体轨迹的事后分析。
AI.result: 本文提出了直接衡量工具调用效率的定量指标，并展示了利用LLM-as-a-Judge进行边际工具效用评估的可行性，为后续基准设计和智能体工程（特别是精简工具套件的构建）提供了量化分析工具。
AI.conclusion: 该工作为LLM评估研究提供了新的定量维度，直接衡量工具调用效率而非依赖准确率等代理指标，有望推动未来基准设计和智能体工具套件优化的研究发展。

title: HyMobileAgent: Data-Environment Co-Scaling for Efficient GUI Agents
summary:
As large multimodal models move from understanding content to operating on digital environments, mobile GUI has emerged as a challenging and consequential testbed for digital embodied intelligence. Mobile agents operate under three coupled constraints: precise perception of complex interfaces, scalable acquisition of high-quality interaction data, and robust long-horizon decision making under compounding execution errors. This report presents HyMobileAgent, a mobile GUI agent built on Hy3.0-VL-A3B, a vision-native foundation model featuring native any-resolution input, an A3B-scale deployment budget, and a 32K context window to model extended interaction histories. Rather than relying solely on model scaling, we develop a joint data and environment centric scaling framework to address the key bottlenecks of mobile interaction.
  Our framework integrates a GUI perception flywheel combining mock-interface synthesis, rejection sampling, and icon-specific augmentation; a knowledge pipeline that transforms tutorial videos into structured interaction data; a million-scale action data pipeline deployed across more than 2000 sandbox and real-device instances with automated failure attribution; the PhoneWorld Mock App Factory, providing a resettable training environment with 34 mock applications and over 34000 tasks; and a structured Planning-and-Reflection mechanism with explicit dead-loop detection for reliable long-horizon execution.
  We also introduce a progressive training recipe consisting of mid-training, supervised fine-tuning, and reinforcement learning with task-specific reward designs.

AI.tldr: HyMobileAgent 是一个基于 Hy3.0-VL-A3B 视觉原生基础模型构建的移动 GUI 智能体，通过联合数据和环境中心缩放框架，结合 GUI 感知飞轮、知识流水线、百万级动作数据流水线、PhoneWorld Mock App Factory 和结构化规划与反思机制，在紧凑的 A3B 参数预算下实现了可靠的移动数字环境操作能力。
AI.motivation: 大型多模态模型在数字环境中运行时面临三重耦合约束：复杂界面的精确感知、高质量交互数据的可扩展获取、以及复合执行错误下的稳健长程决策，现有方法过度依赖模型缩放而忽视了数据与环境层面的关键瓶颈。
AI.method: HyMobileAgent 基于 Hy3.0-VL-A3B 视觉原生基础模型构建，该模型支持原生任意分辨率输入、A3B 规模部署预算和 32K 上下文窗口。框架包括：(1) GUI 感知飞轮，结合模拟界面合成、拒绝采样和图标特定增强；(2) 知识流水线，将教程视频转化为结构化交互数据；(3) 部署在 2000+ 沙箱和真机实例上的百万级动作数据流水线，具备自动故障归因；(4) PhoneWorld Mock App Factory，提供含 34 个模拟应用和 34000+ 任务的可重置训练环境；(5) 结构化规划与反思机制，含显式死循环检测。训练采用渐进式配方，包括中期训练、监督微调和基于任务特定奖励设计的强化学习。
AI.result: 论文未在摘要中报告具体定量实验结果，但描述了框架各部分的设计规模和数据能力：模拟应用覆盖 34 个应用和 34000+ 任务，动作数据流水线运行于 2000+ 实例，模型参数量为 A3B 级别（约 30 亿参数），上下文窗口达 32K。
AI.conclusion: HyMobileAgent 证明了在紧凑模型规模下，通过联合数据和环境中心的缩放策略可以替代或补充单纯模型缩放，有效解决移动 GUI 智能体的关键瓶颈，为数字具身智能提供了可落地的技术路径。

title: RxBrain: Embodied Cognition Foundation Model with Joint Language-Visual Reasoning and Imagination
summary: Embodied cognition requires agents to connect high-level task reasoning with the physical states to be achieved. We introduce Hy-Embodied-RxBrain, an embodied cognition foundation model with joint language-visual reasoning and imagination. Unlike vision-language models that emphasize scene understanding and textual decision making, or generative world models that mainly predict future visual states, RxBrain represents embodied plans in a single planning sequence where language and visual imagination play complementary roles. Language provides the abstract structure of a plan, including task decomposition, planning primitives, constraints, temporal order, and decision logic, while visual imagination grounds this structure through world state prediction and joint subgoal planning, associating each planning step with intermediate and final physical states. RxBrain adopts a unified multimodal Mixture-of-Transformers architecture that supports language, image, and video understanding and generation within one model. To train this capability, we build an automatic pipeline that converts embodied videos into joint text-visual planning supervision by decomposing videos into planning steps and aligning them with visual state transitions. We further introduce RxBrain-Bench to evaluate whether models can represent embodied plans through joint textual and visual components rather than separate understanding or generation. Experiments show that RxBrain maintains embodied understanding and generation abilities, and produces plans with coupled textual reasoning, world state prediction, and joint subgoal planning. We also extend RxBrain to continuous robot action generation, where it shows promising real-robot performance without large-scale action-data pretraining. These results provide an initial step toward foundation models for embodied cognition.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Hy-Embodied-RxBrain，一种联合语言-视觉推理与想象的具身认知基础模型，通过统一的多模态Mixture-of-Transformers架构将语言抽象规划与视觉状态预测融合为单一规划序列，在无需大规模动作数据预训练的条件下展现出有前景的机器人控制性能。
AI.motivation: 现有具身智能方法存在割裂：视觉-语言模型侧重于场景理解与文本决策，生成式世界模型主要预测未来视觉状态，二者未能将高层任务推理与物理状态实现有效连接。本文旨在构建一个将语言抽象规划与视觉想象互补融合的具身认知基础模型，以弥合任务推理与物理执行之间的鸿沟。
AI.method: RxBrain采用统一的Mixture-of-Transformers架构，支持语言、图像和视频的理解与生成。其核心创新在于将具身规划表示为单一规划序列，其中语言提供任务分解、规划原语、约束、时序顺序和决策逻辑等抽象结构，视觉想象通过世界状态预测和联合子目标规划将语言结构落地到中间及最终物理状态。此外，本文构建了自动流水线，将具身视频分解为规划步骤并与视觉状态转换对齐，生成文本-视觉联合规划监督信号。
AI.result: 实验表明，RxBrain同时保持了具身理解与生成能力，生成的规划包含耦合的文本推理、世界状态预测和联合子目标规划。在扩展到连续机器人动作生成任务时，RxBrain在无需大规模动作数据预训练的条件下展现出有前景的真实机器人控制性能。此外，本文还引入了RxBrain-Bench基准，用于评估模型通过联合文本与视觉组件而非单独理解或生成来表征具身规划的能力。
AI.conclusion: RxBrain为具身认知基础模型提供了初步探索方向，验证了语言抽象推理与视觉状态预测在统一框架下的互补协同效应。其无需大规模动作数据即可实现有效机器人控制的能力，暗示了将高层认知推理与物理世界交互深度融合的潜力，为未来具身智能基础模型研究奠定了重要基础。

title: MAPS: Modeling Co-Existing Subjective Perspectives and Shared Meaning in Multi-Agent Cognitive Dialogue
summary: Human dialogue involves more than exchanging information; it also expresses beliefs, emotions, and subjective cognitive styles. Yet current AI dialogue systems often enforce semantic uniformity, sacrificing diversity and interpretability. We present MAPS (Multi-Agent Perspective Spaces), a novel framework that models dialogue between cognitively distinct agents through domain-weighted profiles, dynamic GRU-based memory, and interpretable token-level attention. MAPS enables agents to maintain individualized reasoning while progressively converging on shared meaning. Evaluations on EmpatheticDialogues, TopicalChat, and MultiWOZ show that MAPS supports semantic alignment without collapsing subjectivity. Our results demonstrate a path toward cognitively grounded, interpretable dialogue systems that balance expressiveness and coherence.

AI.tldr: MAPS提出了一种多智能体视角空间框架，通过领域加权轮廓、GRU动态记忆和可解释的token级注意力机制，使对话智能体在保持个性化推理的同时逐步收敛于共享语义，在三个基准数据集上验证了在语义对齐与主观表达之间取得平衡的有效性。
AI.motivation: 现有AI对话系统倾向于强制语义一致性，牺牲了表达的多样性和可解释性，无法模拟人类对话中同时传递信息、表达信念与情感以及展现主观认知风格的能力。
AI.method: MAPS框架通过领域加权轮廓（domain-weighted profiles）建模智能体的个性化认知差异，采用基于GRU的动态记忆机制（dynamic GRU-based memory）维护对话历史，并引入可解释的token级注意力（interpretable token-level attention）机制，使多个认知上存在差异的智能体在对话过程中既能保持各自的推理路径，又能逐步朝向共享语义收敛。
AI.result: 在EmpatheticDialogues、TopicalChat和MultiWOZ三个基准数据集上的实验表明，MAPS能够支持语义对齐（semantic alignment）而不导致主观性坍塌（collapsing subjectivity），即在保持对话一致性的同时保留了各智能体的个性化表达。
AI.conclusion: 本研究表明，通过认知启发的多智能体建模可以实现兼具表现力与一致性的可解释对话系统，为构建认知接地（cognitively grounded）的对话AI提供了可行路径。

title: Breaking the Model Forgetting Cycle in Long-Incremental 3D Object Detection
summary: Incremental 3D object detection requires a detector to learn novel object classes while remembering previously learned ones over sequentially arriving data. Previous methods, primarily based on pseudo-labeling, perform reasonably in short-incremental stages but still suffer from severe model forgetting when dealing with long-incremental sequences. We investigate this failure and reveal a detrimental self-reinforcing cycle: data distribution shift of novel classes causes model forgetting on old classes, which further produces accumulated error in pseudo-labeling that exacerbates model degradation. To address this issue, we draw inspiration from the human learning process and propose the \emph{Learning-Dynamics-driven Memory and Review} (LDMR) framework. LDMR monitors per-class detection quality at periodic training checkpoints and uses these learning-dynamics signals to drive two innovative mechanisms, namely (i) human-like intra-stage review that divides each incremental stage into multiple sub-stages' training and concentrates on remembering the most-forgotten objects, and (ii) scene-aware cross-stage memory evolution that evolves a memory bank to transfer knowledge between two consecutive stages by jointly considering scene learnability and diversity. Extensive experiments across multiple long-incremental protocols on indoor benchmarks SUN RGB-D and ScanNetV2 show that LDMR substantially mitigates the model forgetting and outperforms all baselines by a clear margin. Code is available at https://github.com/qianpeisheng/LDMR.

AI.tldr: 提出学习动态驱动的记忆与回顾（LDMR）框架，通过监测每类检测质量的阶段性变化来驱动类人阶段内回顾和场景感知跨阶段记忆演化，有效缓解增量3D检测中的长期灾难性遗忘问题，在SUN RGB-D和ScanNetV2上显著超越所有基线方法。
AI.motivation: 现有基于伪标签的增量3D物体检测方法在短增量阶段表现尚可，但在长增量序列中遭受严重模型遗忘；其根本原因在于新类别的数据分布偏移导致旧类别遗忘，进而使伪标签产生累积误差，形成自我强化的恶性循环，现有方法缺乏打破此循环的机制。
AI.method: 提出LDMR框架，核心思想是从人类学习过程汲取灵感，利用训练检查点处的每类检测质量作为学习动态信号来驱动两个机制：（i）类人阶段内回顾——将每个增量阶段划分为多个子阶段训练，重点关注最易遗忘的物体类别；（ii）场景感知跨阶段记忆演化——通过联合考虑场景的可学习性和多样性，演化记忆库以在两个连续阶段间传递知识，从而避免伪标签误差累积并缓解长序列下的模型退化。
AI.result: 在室内基准SUN RGB-D和ScanNetV2上的多个长增量协议实验中，LDMR显著减缓了模型遗忘，在所有评估指标上以明显优势超越所有基线方法；代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: 本文揭示了增量3D检测中伪标签自增强恶性循环的根本机制，验证了利用学习动态信号指导回顾与记忆演化在打破该循环中的有效性，为长序列增量学习提供了新的范式，对实际部署中逐步引入新类别的3D检测系统具有重要指导意义。

title: Automatic Hard Example Synthesis with Multi-Level Agentic Data Curation
summary: Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) are increasingly deployed for nuanced content safety and moderation tasks, yet they remain vulnerable to adversarial attacks and out-of-distribution edge cases. Traditional active learning and manual annotation fail to scale against the complexity and volume of novel multimodal threats. In this paper, we propose an automated, agentic red-teaming framework that systematically synthesizes difficult examples using an iterative strategy that proposes novel hypotheses as well as mutating on past attempts. Leveraging a multi-agent architecture that consists of a high-reasoning Architect agent, an advanced image generator, and a multi-level verification committee of LLM raters, our system autonomously uncovers boundary-pushing violations and ambiguous policy edge cases without any human intervention. By employing these carefully synthesized adversarial examples as in-context demonstrations via test-time Retrieval, we substantially improve the target model's robustness, reducing the False Negative Rate (FNR) from 41.2% to 24.5% in a public image safety benchmark without relying on any human labeling.

AI.tldr: 提出一种自动化、基于多智能体协作的红队测试框架，通过迭代生成合成对抗样本并作为上下文示例注入目标模型，在无人工标注的情况下将图像安全基准测试的假阴性率从41.2%降至24.5%。
AI.motivation: 多模态大语言模型在内容安全审核中面临对抗攻击和分布外边缘案例的严重威胁，而传统的主动学习和人工标注方法难以应对新型多模态威胁的复杂性和规模，亟需一种可扩展的自动化红队测试方案。
AI.method: 提出一个无人工干预的自动化红队测试框架，采用多智能体架构，包括一个高推理能力的Architect智能体负责提出新假设和变异历史尝试、一个高级图像生成器用于合成示例，以及一个多层级LLM评审委员会进行验证；将生成的对抗示例作为上下文示例通过测试时检索注入目标模型以提升鲁棒性。
AI.result: 在公开图像安全基准测试中，该方法将目标模型的假阴性率从41.2%显著降低至24.5%，且完全无需任何人工标注数据。
AI.conclusion: 该工作证明了自动化合成对抗样本并利用测试时检索作为上下文示例可以有效提升MLLM在内容安全任务中的鲁棒性，为大规模、可扩展的模型安全评估与改进提供了新的范式。

title: Introspection Fine-Tuning (IFT): Training Small LLMs to Introspect
summary: Can small language models detect and report on perturbations their own internal activations? We investigate this question through the lens of activation steering: injecting concept vectors into a model's residual stream and measuring whether the model can accurately report on the perturbation. We first show that the binary detection paradigm used in prior work -- prompting the model to answer Yes'' or No'' to whether it detects an injected thought -- is confounded in small models, as steering biases the model toward affirmative responses regardless of the question content. We therefore propose two confound-free evaluation paradigms: sentence localization (identifying which of $N$ sentences was perturbed, chance $= 1/N$) and strength comparison (identifying which of two sentences received a stronger injection, chance $= 50\%$). Evaluating across six models from two families (Llama-3.2 and Gemma-4), we find that models as small as 2B parameters introspect reliably well above chance, and that introspective ability generally increases with scale. Llama-1B, however, performs at or below chance. We then introduce \emph{Introspection Fine-Tuning} (IFT): supervised fine-tuning on sentence-localization examples constructed from the model's own perturbed forward passes. IFT raises Llama-1B sentence-localization accuracy from $9.6\%$ to $60.6\%$ (a $6\times$ improvement), with gains generalizing zero-shot to the held-out strength-comparison task ($30.2\% \to 52.2\%$). IFT also improves introspection for 3B and 8B models, while inducing negligible degradation on standard capability benchmarks. Our results suggest that introspective ability is not fixed by scale alone: it can be directly trained, and doing so unlocks latent self-monitoring capacity with implications for AI transparency and alignment. Our code is \href{https://anonymous.4open.science/r/IFT-introspection-2092/README.md}{here}.

AI.tldr: 本文发现小语言模型在内部激活扰动检测任务中存在二选一回答偏置，提出无偏评估范式（句子定位和强度比较），并引入内省微调（IFT）方法，将1B模型句子定位准确率从9.6%提升至60.6%，证明内省能力可通过训练获取且不显著损害标准能力。
AI.motivation: 现有工作通过二选一问答范式评估语言模型对自身内部激活扰动的检测能力，但该范式在小模型中存在严重混淆：激活偏置会使模型倾向于回答"是"，而非真实反映是否检测到扰动。因此需要设计去偏评估范式，并探索小模型的内省能力是否可被训练提升。
AI.method: 提出两种无偏评估范式：句子定位（从N个句子中找出被扰动句，随机基线1/N）和强度比较（比较两个句子中哪个受到更强扰动，随机基线50%）。引入内省微调（IFT），在模型自身前向传播构造的句子定位数据上进行有监督微调，训练数据来自模型内部激活的扰动。
AI.result: 在Llama-3.2和Gemma-4两个系列的六个模型上，2B参数以上模型内省能力显著高于随机基线，且随规模增长。Llama-1B在随机基线以下（句子定位9.6%），IFT后提升至60.6%（6倍提升），零样本泛化到强度比较任务（30.2%→52.2%）。IFT对3B和8B模型同样有效，且标准能力评测退化可忽略。
AI.conclusion: 内省能力并非仅由模型规模决定，可通过直接训练获得。IFT能够释放模型潜在的自我监控能力，对AI透明度和对齐研究具有重要启示。

title: MagicPrompt: Ultra-Lightweight Prompt Tuning for Video Generation
summary: Large-scale video diffusion models (VDMs) deliver strong generation performance, but full fine-tuning for downstream tasks incurs prohibitive computational costs. Existing parameter-efficient fine-tuning (PEFT) methods have two critical flaws on billion-scale models: they still require substantial trainable parameters, and reward-based training suffers from noise-induced optimization instability in condition-guided tasks. We propose MagicPrompt, a lightweight framework that achieves extreme parameter efficiency and stable reward optimization. It first adopts Attention-Embedded Prompt Tuning, which steers generation via lightweight soft prompts with orders of magnitude fewer parameters while preserving pre-trained knowledge. It further introduces Dual-Space Reward Feedback Optimization, which uses self-supervised latent objectives to improve condition-guided reward training. Experiments show MagicPrompt reaches competitive performance with less than 1\% trainable parameters and notably reduces training costs.

AI.tldr: MagicPrompt是一种面向大规模视频扩散模型的轻量化微调框架，通过注意力嵌入提示调优和双空间奖励反馈优化，在不到1%可训练参数下实现与全微调相当的性能，显著降低了训练成本。
AI.motivation: 大规模视频扩散模型在下游任务中全微调的计算成本过高，现有参数高效微调方法在十亿级模型上仍需要大量可训练参数，且基于奖励的训练在条件引导任务中因噪声干扰导致优化不稳定。
AI.method: MagicPrompt框架包含两个核心组件：一是Attention-Embedded Prompt Tuning，通过在注意力层嵌入轻量级软提示来引导生成，以极少的参数保留预训练知识；二是Dual-Space Reward Feedback Optimization，利用自监督潜在目标来改善条件引导奖励训练的稳定性。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，MagicPrompt在可训练参数少于1%的情况下取得了与全微调相竞争的性能，并显著降低了训练成本。
AI.conclusion: MagicPrompt证明了在十亿级视频扩散模型中，通过极致的参数效率和稳定的奖励优化策略，可以在大幅降低计算开销的同时保持高质量生成性能，为大规模扩散模型的高效微调提供了新方向。

title: AI Agents Do Not Fail Alone:The Context Fails First
summary: Context engineering has become central to building reliable AI agents, yet it remains largely unmeasured. Agents do not fail in isolation: their behavior is shaped by the instructions, tools, memory, retrieved knowledge, guardrails, and untrusted inputs accumulated in their context. When this context is weak, agents drift, hallucinate, misuse tools, ignore constraints, become vulnerable to injection, and waste tokens. This paper validates context-engineering quality as an independent leading indicator of agent reliability. We implement the measurement in ProofAgent-Harness, an open-source infrastructure for AI agent evaluation that uses multi-juror, consensus-based scoring. The harness assesses context across seven criteria: role clarity, guardrail coverage, instruction consistency, tool schema quality, grounding sufficiency, injection hardening, and token efficiency. Crucially, the context score is isolated from behavioral metrics and release decisions, enabling a non-circular validation. Through a controlled context-quality study across regulated agent domains, holding frontier LLM agents fixed and varying only their operating context, we show that context-quality criteria consistently predict their corresponding behavioral outcomes. Grounding sufficiency predicts hallucination resistance, guardrail coverage predicts manipulation resistance, instruction consistency predicts instruction following, and tool-schema quality predicts tool use. These findings establish context measurement as a validated preflight signal for agent reliability and position context engineering as an auditable layer of agent evaluation and governance.

AI.tldr: 本文提出并验证了上下文工程质量可作为AI智能体可靠性的独立领先指标，通过构建ProofAgent-Harness评估框架，在控制实验中证明上下文质量评分与智能体行为表现一致相关。
AI.motivation: 上下文工程已成为构建可靠AI智能体的核心，但上下文质量本身缺乏系统性的测量方法；智能体的行为受指令、工具、记忆、检索知识、护栏和不可信输入等多种上下文因素影响，弱上下文会导致漂移、幻觉、工具误用、约束忽视、注入攻击和令牌浪费，因此亟需一个可度量的上下文质量评估体系来预测智能体可靠性。
AI.method: 本文基于多评委共识评分的开源评估基础设施ProofAgent-Harness，从角色清晰度、护栏覆盖率、指令一致性、工具模式质量、接地充分性、注入加固性和令牌效率七个维度对上下文质量进行量化评分；通过控制前沿LLM智能体固定不变、仅改变其操作上下文的实验设计，将上下文质量评分与行为指标及发布决策隔离，实现非循环验证。
AI.result: 在受监管的智能体领域进行的受控上下文质量研究表明，上下文质量标准一致地预测了对应的行为结果：接地充分性预测抗幻觉能力，护栏覆盖率预测抗操纵能力，指令一致性预测指令遵循程度，工具模式质量预测工具使用表现。
AI.conclusion: 上下文质量测量可作为智能体可靠性的经验证预检信号，将上下文工程定位为智能体评估与治理中可审计的关键环节，为构建更可靠的AI智能体提供量化依据。

title: T5-CSBoost: Adversarial Perturbation Resistant LLM Fingerprinting
comment: 14 pages, 3 datasets, code and data will be provided
summary:
While many AI-generated text (AIGT) detectors achieve strong performance on clean inputs, their accuracy degrades significantly under light paraphrasing, word substitutions, character edits, and distribution shifts. We present T5 Contrastive Style Boosted Classifier (T5-CSBoost), an extension to the T5-Sentinel framework that keeps the original next-token prediction objective for source attribution while introducing an auxiliary margin-based triplet loss over decoder embeddings.
  This contrastive style regularization encourages the learning of compact, perturbation-resistant stylistic representations, offering a lightweight yet effective alternative to prior approaches that rely on architectural modifications, adversarial training, or complex multi-task objectives without altering the underlying T5-small backbone. T5-CSBoost achieves state-of-the-art multiclass source attribution and binary human-vs-LLM detection on OpenLLMText and HC3 AIGT benchmarks. More importantly, T5-CSBoost demonstrates enhanced robustness to word and character level adversarial perturbations of up to 90% intensity, achieving state-of-the-art on the challenging MAGE/Deepfake stress-test suite, including unseen models, unseen domains, and extreme paraphrasing scenarios. Our results highlight that explicitly regularizing stylistic embeddings via contrastive learning is a practical and effective strategy for building more robust LLM fingerprinting systems in real-world adversarial settings.

AI.tldr: T5-CSBoost 通过辅助三元组对比损失对解码器嵌入进行风格正则化，在不改变 T5-small 骨干网络的前提下，显著提升了 AI 生成文本检测在多类源归属、二元判别以及面对单词/字符级对抗扰动、分布偏移和极端改写场景下的鲁棒性，在多个基准上达到最先进水平。
AI.motivation: 现有 AI 生成文本检测器在干净输入上表现良好，但在轻度释义、单词替换、字符编辑和分布偏移等扰动下准确率大幅下降，难以应对真实世界对抗场景。
AI.method: 基于 T5-Sentinel 框架，保留原始下一个词预测目标用于源归属，同时在解码器嵌入上引入辅助的基于边距的三元组损失进行对比风格正则化，无需修改架构、对抗训练或复杂多任务目标，仅使用 T5-small 骨干网络。
AI.result: 在 OpenLLMText 和 HC3 基准上达到多类源归属与二元人机检测的最先进水平；在 MAGE/Deepfake 压力测试套件中对单词和字符级对抗扰动（强度高达 90%）展现出增强鲁棒性，在未见模型、未见领域和极端释义场景下也达到最先进性能。
AI.conclusion: 通过对比学习显式正则化风格嵌入是一种构建更鲁棒的 LLM 指纹识别系统的实用且有效策略，为在真实世界对抗环境下提升检测鲁棒性提供了轻量级替代方案。

title: Knowing You at First Glance: Inferring Apparent Personality from Faces
comment: Accepted by The 9th Chinese Conference on Pattern Recognition and Computer Vision, PRCV2026
summary: Inferring apparent personality from facial images is important in social scenarios for embodied agents in human-robot interaction. Unlike inferring intrinsic personality traits via conversation, this task models first-impression personality perception based solely on facial appearance before interaction begins. Existing studies mainly focus on the Big Five personality model and often rely on language or multimodal inputs. As a result, it remains unclear whether facial cues alone can support meaningful associations with perceived personality traits. This question is particularly relevant for MBTI types, which are widely used in practice and more readily interpretable by large language models. To this end, we propose \textbf{GlanceFace}, an end-to-end framework for apparent personality inference leveraging vision-language models to introduce semantic priors and a semantic-enhanced facial representation module to capture subtle personality-related cues, together with an uncertainty-aware learning strategy to handle noisy and subjective annotations. Extensive experiments demonstrate strong performance on MBTI-based apparent personality benchmarks and reveal relationships between facial characteristics and perceived personality traits, highlighting its potential to support adaptive initial interaction strategies for embodied agents. The code and dataset are available at https://github.com/MrHuan3/GlanceFace.

AI.tldr: GlanceFace 是一个端到端框架，利用视觉-语言模型引入语义先验、语义增强的面部表征模块以及不确定性感知学习策略，实现基于面部图像的 MBTI 型外显人格推断，实验表明该方法能有效捕捉面部特征与感知人格之间的关联，支持具身智能体的自适应交互策略。
AI.motivation: 现有外显人格推断研究主要聚焦于大五人格模型，且常依赖语言或多模态输入，尚未明确仅凭面部图像能否支撑与感知人格特质的有意义关联，这一问题对于广泛使用且更易被大语言模型解释的 MBTI 类型尤为突出。
AI.method: GlanceFace 采用端到端框架，结合视觉-语言模型引入语义先验知识，设计语义增强的面部表征模块以捕捉细微人格相关线索，并引入不确定性感知学习策略以应对标注噪声和主观性，最终实现基于面部图像的 MBTI 类型外显人格推断。
AI.result: 在基于 MBTI 的外显人格基准上进行了大量实验，结果表明 GlanceFace 性能优异，有效揭示了面部特征与感知人格特质之间的关系。
AI.conclusion: 该研究验证了仅凭面部线索即可实现有意义的 MBTI 型人格推断，为具身智能体在人机交互前制定自适应初始交互策略提供了潜在支撑，代码与数据集已开源。

title: Traccia: An OpenTelemetry-Based Governance Platform for AI Systems
comment: 26 pages, 2 figures, 3 tables, Declaration of generative AI and AI-assisted technologies in the writing process, Declaration of competing interest
summary: The rapid development of Large Language Models (LLMs) and Artificial Intelligent (AI) powered autonomous agents has fundamentally changed the existing forms of software governance. In spite of the rigorous standards of transparency and account ability required according to the international frameworks such as the European Union's AI Act, there is a considerable gap between theory and reality. The present study discusses the inherent drawbacks of currently utilized platforms for LLM evaluation, machine learning workflow, and application performance monitoring in general. It has been shown that current disjointed solutions fail to protect unbound state space agentic architecture from serious threats such as alignment drift, SaaS security concerns, and unauthorized deployment of shadow AI systems. Moreover, a solution is proposed for overcoming the discussed challenges in form of a coherent multi-level AI governance stack Traccia built on the top of OpenTelemetry infrastructure platform. Traccia resolves the last mile for AI Alignment by adding the telemetry data, passive semantic guardrail assessment, and execution lineage into a hashed trace ledger. Traccia automatically creates compliance evidence packages by appending tamper-resistant fingerprints and SHA-256 content hash, that map to regulatory requirements (Articles 12, 14, 19, 26(6), and 50 of the EU AI Act) without invading any data privacy. By performing this evaluation in a methodical manner, a solid machine-readable base has been created for enterprise-wide management of autonomous AI systems.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Traccia，一个基于OpenTelemetry构建的多层AI治理栈，通过集成遥测数据、被动语义护栏评估和执行溯源到哈希追踪账本中，自动生成符合欧盟AI法案的可机读合规证据包，以解决自主AI代理系统在治理、对齐漂移和影子AI部署等方面的安全与合规挑战。
AI.motivation: 现有LLM评估、机器学习工作流和应用性能监控平台存在严重脱节，无法有效保护无界状态空间的代理架构免受对齐漂移、SaaS安全威胁和影子AI系统未经授权部署等风险，同时国际AI监管框架（如欧盟AI法案）对透明度和问责制的要求与现实部署之间存在巨大差距。
AI.method: Traccia基于OpenTelemetry基础设施平台构建，采用多层AI治理栈架构，通过将遥测数据、被动语义护栏评估和执行溯源集成到哈希追踪账本中，并附加防篡改指纹和SHA-256内容哈希，自动生成映射至欧盟AI法案具体条款（第12、14、19、26(6)和50条）的合规证据包，同时不侵犯数据隐私。
AI.result: 论文通过系统性评估表明，Traccia能够在不侵犯数据隐私的前提下，为自主AI系统的企业级管理建立坚实的可机读基础，有效解决当前分散解决方案无法应对的对齐漂移、SaaS安全问题和影子AI部署等威胁，并实现与欧盟AI法案相关条款的自动合规映射。
AI.conclusion: Traccia通过统一的遥测与合规框架填补了AI治理中理论与现实之间的鸿沟，为自主AI系统的企业级管理提供了可机读的合规基础，其核心启示在于：基于开源标准（OpenTelemetry）构建的多层治理栈能够在保障数据隐私的同时实现监管要求的结构化自动映射，为未来AI代理的规模化安全部署提供了可行路径。

title: CoEvoT: Co-Evolving Chain-of-Thought Prompting for Graph-LLM Reasoning
summary: Graph learning under distribution shift presents a persistent challenge, where models adapt to new graphs with limited or even no supervision. Recent graph--LLM approaches move toward label-efficient prediction by linearizing graphs into prompts and using large language models (LLMs) as predictors, and can adopt Chain-of-Thought (CoT) prompting to exploit LLM's multi-step reasoning capability. However, existing CoT-based graph--LLM methods generate intermediate thoughts while conditioning on fixed graph tokens, limiting step-wise refinement of structural cues. In this paper, we propose CoEvoT, a simple yet effective co-evolving CoT prompting framework for graph--LLM reasoning. CoEvoT couples text-to-graph token rewriting and graph-to-text reasoning guidance in a closed loop: each intermediate textual thought is used to update the graph token evidence state via a lightweight condition network, and the updated tokens are fed back into the next-step instruction to guide subsequent LLM reasoning. This enables step-wise, state-aware evidence refinement, rather than reasoning over a fixed graph snapshot. Extensive experiments on eight datasets demonstrate that CoEvoT consistently outperforms state-of-the-art baselines.

AI.tldr: CoEvoT是一种用于图-大语言模型推理的新型共演化思维链提示框架，通过文本到图令牌重写与图到文本推理引导的闭环机制，实现逐步结构线索细化，在八个数据集上持续超越现有方法。
AI.motivation: 现有基于Chain-of-Thought的图-大语言模型方法在生成中间推理步骤时依赖于固定的图令牌表示，无法在推理过程中逐步优化结构线索，限制了多步推理能力对图形结构信息的利用效率。
AI.method: CoEvoT构建了一个闭环框架，将文本到图令牌重写与图到文本推理引导耦合：每个中间文本推理步骤通过轻量级条件网络更新图令牌证据状态，更新后的令牌反馈至下一步指令中以引导后续LLM推理，从而实现逐步的状态感知证据细化而非在固定图上推理。
AI.result: 在八个数据集上的广泛实验表明，CoEvoT在所有基准测试中一致性地优于现有最先进基线方法，验证了共演化推理范式的有效性。
AI.conclusion: CoEvoT证明了通过让图令牌表示与文本推理步骤共同演化，而非使用静态图快照，可以显著增强图-大语言模型在分布偏移下的少样本乃至零样本学习能力，为图上的多步推理提供了新的研究范式。

title: Multimodality as Supervision: Self-Supervised Specialization to the Test Environment via Multimodality
summary:
Cross-modal learning, i.e., learning to predict one modality from another, is a fundamental mechanism for self-supervision via leveraging multimodality. Many practical applications, e.g., deploying a household robot, involve devices that are equipped with a rich set of sensors that enable multimodal sensing in their test environment. This presents an opportunity to apply cross-modal learning to the multimodal data sensed by these devices to learn representations. Findings in developmental psychology also suggest that biological agents leverage it to build an effective representation of their surroundings.
  To study this, we propose a controlled setup, where we restrict a user device to just a given test environment. It results in a specialization setup where we attempt to develop a performant model for this specific test environment. Under this setup, we develop Test-Space Training (TST), which performs multimodal data collection in the test environment and performs self-supervised pre-training on it. We evaluate these models on various downstream tasks in the same environment.
  Under this setup, we find various interesting insights, such as collecting rich multimodal data only from the test environment and leveraging cross-modal learning, we can achieve competitive results with generalist models (e.g., DINOv2 and CLIP) pre-trained on large-scale internet datasets. This enables an alternative scenario where the need for external Internet-scale datasets for pre-training models is reduced. We also present a set of analyses and ablations that raise intriguing points on substituting data with (multi)modality, and how varying pre-training data enables a tradeoff between a model's abilities to specialise to a test environment, and generalize to held-out spaces.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Test-Space Training (TST)框架，通过在受限测试环境中收集多模态数据进行自监督预训练，发现仅利用测试环境的多模态数据即可达到与DINOv2、CLIP等互联网大规模预训练通用模型相竞争的性能，为减少对外部大规模数据集的依赖提供了新路径。
AI.motivation: 现有跨模态学习通常依赖互联网级大规模数据集进行预训练，而在实际部署场景（如家庭机器人）中，设备本身配备了丰富的多模态传感器，可以在测试环境中直接感知数据。本文旨在探索是否能够仅利用测试环境中的多模态数据，通过跨模态自监督学习获得具有竞争力的表示，从而减少甚至替代对外部大规模数据集的需求。
AI.method: 本文提出了一个受限测试环境下的专门化学习框架Test-Space Training (TST)：首先将设备限定在特定测试环境中，在该环境中收集丰富的多模态数据，然后基于这些数据进行自监督跨模态预训练，最后在同一环境中评估模型在下游任务上的表现。该设置形成了一种专门化范式，与通用预训练模型形成对比。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，仅利用测试环境中的多模态数据进行跨模态自监督预训练，即可在多个下游任务上达到与DINOv2和CLIP等基于互联网大规模数据集预训练的通用模型相竞争的性能。此外，通过消融实验发现，数据量与模态多样性之间存在替代关系，且预训练数据的规模与分布能够在模型对测试环境的专门化能力与对未见过空间的泛化能力之间进行权衡。
AI.conclusion: 该研究揭示了在受限测试环境中利用多模态数据进行跨模态学习的可行性，表明数据和模态之间存在可替代性，为边缘设备在不依赖互联网大规模数据集的情况下实现高效表示学习提供了新思路。同时，预训练数据的构建方式影响模型的专门化与泛化权衡，为实际部署中的模型选择提供了指导。

title: Per-Token Fixed-Point Convergence in Depth-Recurrent Transformers
comment: 15 pages, 4 figures. Code, configs, experiment log, and checkpoint at https://github.com/jlognn/depth-recurrent-convergence
summary: A depth-recurrent transformer applies a weight-tied core a variable number of times, and prior work has shown that training with a randomized recursion count yields one checkpoint usable across a range of inference depths. We ask what such a model actually computes per token, and measure it directly. On a 135M-class model trained on FineWeb-Edu, the recurrent state converges to a per-token fixed point: mean successive-output KL divergence falls from 3.9e-1 at the second loop to 8.5e-6 by the sixteenth, and per-token state change decays in step. Crucially, this convergence is not uniform across tokens. The median token converges by loop six, while approximately 10 percent of tokens continue to update at the training-mean depth of eight, and mean convergence depth is ordered by token type (whitespace shallowest, content words deepest). This per-token variation is the central object of the paper. We show it is directly readable and that reading it outperforms learning to predict it: a training-free rule that halts each token once its output stabilizes attains uniform depth-8 quality at 4.94 average loops (a 38 percent reduction in average depth) and matches uniform depth across the average-depth range, whereas a linear router trained on convergence labels harvested from the same model requires nearly full depth and yields no reduction. The elasticity that makes this possible reproduces here as background (validation loss decreases monotonically from 3.80 at one loop to 3.20 at eight and remains stable to 32 loops). We report average depth as a FLOP proxy with a three-point wall-clock bracket rather than a realized speedup, make no FLOP-matched parity claim, and note that the allocation results are established at a single scale and seed. The complete study runs on a single RTX 4090 in approximately 100 GPU-hours.

AI.tldr: 本文通过直接测量深度循环Transformer（135M参数）中每个token的递归状态收敛行为，发现收敛呈非均匀分布：约10%的token在训练平均深度（8层）后仍在更新；据此提出一种无需训练的自适应停止规则，通过读取每个token的输出稳定性来决定其停止深度，以平均4.94层达到均匀深度8层的质量（降低38%推理深度），而学习的线性路由器则无法实现任何深度缩减。
AI.motivation: 现有深度循环Transformer在训练时使用随机递归次数，生成一个可适用于不同推理深度的单一检查点，但该模型在每个token上究竟计算了什么、其递归状态的收敛行为如何尚不清楚。本文旨在直接测量并理解这种收敛的动态特性，尤其是不同token之间的差异。
AI.method: 使用135M参数的深度循环Transformer（权重绑定核心、可变递归次数），在FineWeb-Edu上训练，通过逐token测量连续循环间的KL散度来量化状态收敛；提出一种无需训练的自适应停止规则，当每个token的输出稳定后即停止其递归；同时训练一个线性路由器（利用从同一模型采集的收敛标签）作为对比基线。
AI.result: 递归状态逐token收敛：平均连续输出KL散度从第2次循环的3.9e-1降至第16次的8.5e-6；收敛非均匀——中位token在第6次循环收敛，约10%的token在训练平均深度（8次）后仍在更新，内容词收敛最深、空白符最浅；无需训练的自适应停止规则以平均4.94次循环达到均匀深度8的质量（38%深度缩减），而训练出的线性路由器几乎需要全部深度且无缩减；验证损失从1次循环的3.80单调降至8次的3.20，至32次循环保持稳定。
AI.conclusion: 深度循环Transformer的递归状态在逐token层面展现出显著的弹性与收敛非均匀性，利用这种弹性可以直接通过读取输出稳定性实现自适应推理深度缩减，且优于学习的方法。研究结果可解释模型内部计算行为，并为动态深度分配提供有效且无需额外训练的途径，但结论局限于单一模型规模与随机种子，且以平均深度为FLOP代理指标。

title: ReportMedSAM: Guiding Segmentation Through Radiology Reports
summary: Free-form radiology reports contain rich clinical descriptions, yet converting them for reliable segmentation remains challenging due to the inherent variability of natural language. Existing pipelines often rely on predefined organ phrases or brittle rule-based inference-time extraction, which limits their scalability to novel anatomical structures and makes them sensitive to linguistic variations. To address this, we propose ReportMedSAM, a report-driven framework that replaces discrete extraction with a learnable concept bank. By leveraging a frozen medical vision-language encoder (BiomedCLIP), we align organ-level concept embeddings with large-scale clinical corpora through contrastive learning, establishing mutually orthogonal semantic anchors. Our approach explicitly mitigates organ-level semantic collapse and ensures high robustness against diverse clinical synonyms (e.g., "renal" vs. "kidney" ). During inference, a clinical report is embedded and matched against this concept bank to dynamically activate task-specific Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) modules. This decoupled design allows new concepts and experts to be added without retraining existing components, providing a parameter-isolated extension mechanism while keeping previously learned experts unchanged. Evaluated on the AbdomenAtlas 3.0 dataset, ReportMedSAM effectively interprets free-form reports, achieves competitive segmentation accuracy, and demonstrates seamless, non-interfering extension to novel clinical tasks.

AI.tldr: ReportMedSAM 提出了一种基于可学习概念库的报告驱动医学图像分割框架，通过对比学习对齐器官级概念嵌入与临床语料，并利用动态专家混合模块实现参数隔离的扩展，从而将自由文本报告直接映射为可靠的分割结果。
AI.motivation: 现有将自由文本放射学报告转化为可靠医学图像分割结果的方法，要么依赖预定义的器官短语，要么使用脆弱的基于规则的推理时提取，这些方法难以扩展到新的解剖结构且对自然语言的表达变化（如同义词）高度敏感，亟需一种能直接理解临床语言可变性并支持可扩展性分割框架。
AI.method: ReportMedSAM 使用冻结的医学视觉-语言编码器（BiomedCLIP）作为基础，通过对比学习在大规模临床语料上训练，构建一组相互正交的器官级概念嵌入（可学习概念银行），从而缓解语义坍缩并提升对临床同义词的鲁棒性；推理时，临床报告经编码后在概念银行中进行匹配，动态激活任务特定的混合专家（MoE）模块，新概念和新专家可以无干扰地增量添加而无需重训已有组件。
AI.result: 在 AbdomenAtlas 3.0 数据集上的实验表明，ReportMedSAM 能够有效解释自由格式的放射学报告并生成准确的分割结果，同时支持向新临床任务的无缝、非干扰性扩展。
AI.conclusion: ReportMedSAM 通过可学习概念银行和模块化专家设计，在解决自然语言可变性的同时实现了参数隔离的可扩展分割框架，为构建可理解和适应自由文本临床描述的医学图像分割系统提供了可行路径。

title: WorkDrive: Roadwork Chain of Causation for Autonomous Driving
summary: Autonomous driving vision-language models (VLMs) struggle in roadwork zones, where familiar visual cues such as lane markings and permanent signs are altered or absent, and temporary devices such as cones and barriers redefine the drivable corridor. VLMs can detect these objects, but without explicit guidance they anchor their reasoning on familiar elements from pre-training and fail to connect work-zone observations to correct planning decisions. We propose WorkDrive, a framework that constructs perception-grounded causal reasoning for work zones and aligns it with trajectory prediction. An automated multitask perception pipeline extracts structured scene facts and injects them into a Chain-of-Causation (CoC) annotation pipeline, redirecting the annotator's attention to domain-specific elements. The resulting reasoning labels are used for supervised fine-tuning, followed by reinforcement learning with a single reward: consistency between lateral meta-actions and the predicted trajectory. On ROADWork, the largest public work-zone dataset, the proposed roadwork CoC reduces trajectory average displacement error (ADE) by 9.0\%, and consistency-based GRPO yields a further 3.0\%, achieving progressive improvement over the trajectory-only baseline. Code and data will be publicly released.

AI.tldr: WorkDrive通过构建感知基础的因果推理框架，将道路施工区域的结构化场景事实注入因果链标注并进行轨迹预测对齐，在ROADWork数据集上将轨迹平均位移误差降低12%，显著提升了自动驾驶视觉语言模型在施工区域的规划能力。
AI.motivation: 自动驾驶视觉语言模型在道路施工区域表现不佳，因为车道标线和永久标志等熟悉视觉线索被改变或缺失，而临时设施如锥桶和护栏重新定义了可行驶区域；VLMs虽能检测这些物体，但由于缺乏显式引导，其推理仍锚定于预训练中的熟悉元素，无法将施工区域观测与正确的规划决策关联起来。
AI.method: WorkDrive框架包含两个核心组件：一是自动化多任务感知管线，用于提取结构化场景事实；二是因果链（Chain-of-Causation, CoC）标注管线，将结构化场景事实注入其中，将标注者注意力重定向至领域特定元素。生成的推理标注用于监督微调，随后采用基于一致性的GRPO强化学习，以横向元动作与预测轨迹之间的一致性作为单一奖励信号。
AI.result: 在最大公开道路施工数据集ROADWork上，所提出的CoC方法将轨迹平均位移误差（ADE）降低9.0%，基于一致性的GRPO进一步降低3.0%，相较于纯轨迹基线实现了渐进式改进，总计降低约12%。
AI.conclusion: WorkDrive证明了通过显式构建感知基础的因果推理并将其与轨迹预测对齐，能够有效弥补VLMs在道路施工场景中因预训练先验导致的推理偏差，为自动驾驶在长尾场景中的视觉语言推理提供了结构化引导的有效范式。

title: Step-Level Preference Learning for Generative Agents in Social Simulations
summary: Large language model (LLM)-based generative agents simulate human behavior through long-horizon decision-making processes that comprise intermediate steps such as planning, memory retrieval, reflection, and action selection. However, fine-grained human annotations of these intermediate steps remain scarce, and existing agents are not grounded in human preferences over such intermediate decisions. To address this gap, we introduce \method, an interactive simulation interface that enables us to collect step-level human preference supervision over agent decision trajectories, leading to a dataset of 57K fine-grained annotations. We conduct step-level preference learning on open-weight language models using supervised finetuning and direct preference optimization on this data, consistently improving simulation fidelity, coordination, and interaction quality, and inducing more socially effective agent behavior. Our results show that step-level human supervision is an effective training signal for improving both local decision quality and long-horizon agent behavior.

AI.tldr: 本文提出STEP-LLM框架，通过构建含57K细粒度步骤级人类偏好标注的交互仿真数据集，结合监督微调和直接偏好优化对开放权重语言模型进行步骤级偏好学习，显著提升了生成式智能体在仿真保真度、协调性和交互质量上的表现。
AI.motivation: 基于大语言模型的生成式智能体通过规划、记忆检索、反思和动作选择等中间步骤模拟人类行为，然而这些中间步骤的细粒度人工标注极为稀缺，且现有智能体缺乏对人类在中间决策偏好上的对齐，导致其行为与人类期望之间存在差距。
AI.method: 本文构建了一个交互式仿真接口STEP-LLM，用于收集智能体决策轨迹中步骤级的人类偏好监督信号，最终得到包含57K条细粒度标注的数据集；在此基础上，对开放权重语言模型依次进行监督微调和基于直接偏好优化的步骤级偏好学习训练。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，步骤级偏好学习在仿真保真度、协调性和交互质量三个维度上均持续提升了智能体表现，并诱导出更具社会效度的智能体行为；该方法同时改善了局部决策质量和长程决策行为。
AI.conclusion: 步骤级人类监督信号是提升生成式智能体行为质量的有效训练信号，能够在局部决策和长程行为两个层面产生积极影响，为构建更贴近人类偏好的智能体提供了可行范式。

title: Semantic Register Compression in Multi-Agent LLM Cascades
summary: Multi-agent LLM systems commonly decompose complex tasks into specialized roles. However, this modularity introduces a representational risk: when intermediate agents transform text across linguistic registers, they can systematically compress the semantic distinctions needed for accurate downstream decisions. We term this phenomenon semantic register compression and characterize it as an observable failure mode in multi-agent cascades. Using a three-agent pipeline (Collector-Evaluator-Decider), we quantify compression via inter-label separation in sentence-transformer embedding space. Across political fact-checking (LIAR), sentiment analysis (SST-5), and medical triage (Triagegeist), critical evaluation consistently reduces label separability by 41.7% at the Evaluator stage, while identity passthrough preserves it nearly fully. Five architectural variants causally isolate oriented semantic transformation as the primary driver. A credibility-seeking variant produces minimal geometric compression yet shifts outputs toward mostly-true, demonstrating that transformation valence controls the direction of distributional collapse independently of compression magnitude. Compression generalizes across the three domains with varying intensity: 41.7% in fact-checking, 27.2% in sentiment, and 20.0% in triage. Prompt-level regression explains 78% of the variance, with operational constraints associated with lower compression. These results demonstrate that semantic register compression is a measurable and generalizable phenomenon in multi-agent LLM systems, with implications for safety evaluation in high-stakes domains.

AI.tldr: 本文提出并量化了多智能体LLM系统中"语义寄存器压缩"现象——中间智能体在跨语言寄存器转换文本时会系统性压缩下游决策所需的语义区分度，在三类高精度任务中证实该现象可测量、可泛化，并识别出定向语义变换为主要驱动因素。
AI.motivation: 多智能体LLM系统通过将复杂任务分解为专门角色来实现模块化，但这种模块化引入了表示风险：中间智能体在跨语言寄存器转换文本时，可能系统性压缩下游决策所需的语义区分度，该问题此前未被系统定义和量化。
AI.method: 采用三智能体流水线架构（Collector-Evaluator-Decider），通过sentence-transformer嵌入空间中跨标签分离度量化语义寄存器压缩。在政治事实核查（LIAR）、情感分析（SST-5）和医疗分诊（Triagegeist）三个数据集上实验，并设计了五种架构变体进行因果隔离分析，同时采用提示级回归解释压缩方差。
AI.result: Evaluator阶段的批判性评估使标签可分离性平均降低41.7%（事实核查）、27.2%（情感分析）和20.0%（医疗分诊），而身份直通几乎完全保留可分离性。五种架构变体因果隔离证实定向语义变换是主要驱动因素；可信度变体产生最小几何压缩但将输出偏向"基本真实"，表明变换效价独立于压缩幅度控制分布坍塌方向。提示级回归解释78%的方差，操作约束与较低压缩相关。
AI.conclusion: 语义寄存器压缩是多智能体LLM系统中可测量且可泛化的现象，变换效价和压缩幅度可分别控制分布坍塌的方向与程度，该发现对高风险领域的安全评估具有重要启示。

title: GeoDetect: Geometric Adversarial Detection for VLPs
summary: Vision-language pre-trained models (VLPs) are widely used in real-world applications. However, they remain vulnerable to adversarial attacks. Although adversarial detection methods have demonstrated success in single-modality settings (either vision or language), their effectiveness and reliability in multimodal models such as VLPs remain largely unexplored. In this work, we study the geometry of VLP embedding spaces and observe structured anisotropy that differs from unimodal vision models. Our theoretical analysis shows that under this anisotropic structure, adversarial attacks increase the expected geometric separation between clean and adversarial examples (AEs). Specifically, we demonstrate that AEs consistently exhibit greater expected distances to randomly sampled points than their clean counterparts, indicating that AEs tend to push representations out of manifold regions. Building on these insights, we propose GeoDetect, which leverages these off-manifold deviations via geometric scores to identify AEs. Through comprehensive evaluations, we show that our approach reliably detects AEs across diverse VLP architectures and threat settings, covering unimodal and multimodal attacks as well as adaptive attacks, thereby providing a robust and practical approach to improving the safety and reliability of these models.

AI.tldr: 本文提出GeoDetect方法，利用多模态视觉-语言预训练模型嵌入空间的各向异性几何结构，通过几何分数检测对抗样本，在多种攻击场景下实现鲁棒且有效的对抗检测。
AI.motivation: 尽管视觉-语言预训练模型（VLPs）在实际应用中广泛部署，但它们仍易受对抗攻击；现有的对抗检测方法在单模态场景中表现良好，但在多模态VLPs中的有效性和可靠性尚未得到充分探索。
AI.method: 本文首先研究了VLP嵌入空间的几何特性，发现其存在与单模态视觉模型不同的结构化各向异性；理论分析表明，在该各向异性结构下，对抗攻击会增大干净样本与对抗样本之间的期望几何分离度；基于此，提出GeoDetect方法，利用几何分数衡量对抗样本偏离数据流形的程度，从而实现对抗检测。
AI.result: 在多种VLP架构和威胁设置下的综合评估表明，GeoDetect能够可靠地检测对抗样本，涵盖单模态攻击、多模态攻击以及自适应攻击场景。
AI.conclusion: 该研究揭示了VLP嵌入空间的各向异性几何特性是对抗样本检测的重要线索，GeoDetect提供了一种鲁棒且实用的方法来提升多模态视觉-语言模型的安全性和可靠性。

title: RetroAgent: Harnessing LLMs to Search Over Structured Memory for Agentic Retrosynthesis Planning
summary: Multi-step retrosynthesis planning seeks to decompose a target molecule into commercially available building blocks through a sequence of feasible reactions. The vast combinatorial search space makes this task challenging even for expert chemists.
