Traditional methods combine tree search with offline-trained value networks that score candidates in isolation, without reasoning about complete multi-step routes. Recent work leverages Large Language Models (LLMs) for this task, but relies on simple interfaces that limit exploration of the full search space. We introduce RetroAgent, an LLM agent that bridges symbolic search and neural reasoning through a harness with structured memory. Through memory and chemistry tools, the agent observes the full search state, including explored routes, available alternatives, and properties of intermediates, enabling informed decisions grounded in both global progress and domain knowledge. Experiments on in-distribution and out-of-distribution benchmarks demonstrate that RetroAgent delivers strong performance and generalization.

AI.tldr: RetroAgent是一个结合符号搜索与神经推理的LLM智能体，通过结构化记忆和化学工具观察完整搜索状态，在逆合成规划中实现了强大的性能与泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 多步逆合成规划面临巨大的组合搜索空间，传统方法依赖离线训练的价值网络孤立地评分候选分子，缺乏对完整多步路线的全局推理；而现有的基于大语言模型的方法仅采用简单接口，限制了全搜索空间的探索能力。
AI.method: 提出RetroAgent框架，将大语言模型作为智能体，通过结构化记忆（structured memory）和化学工具（chemistry tools）桥接符号搜索与神经推理；智能体能够观察完整搜索状态（包括已探索路径、可用替代方案及中间体性质），从而基于全局进展和领域知识做出更优的决策。
AI.result: 在分布内（in-distribution）和分布外（out-of-distribution）基准测试上的实验结果表明，RetroAgent在逆合成规划任务中取得了优异的性能，并展现出良好的泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: 将LLM智能体与结构化记忆及化学工具深度融合，能够有效提升逆合成规划中搜索决策的全局性与信息丰富度，为结合符号搜索与神经推理提供了可行范式，并展现出较强的分布外泛化潜力。

title: Breaking Refusal in the First Half: A Mechanistic Study of the Prefill Jailbreak
comment: 31 pages, 3 figures. Code and derived artifacts: https://github.com/collapseindex/breaking-refusal
summary: Aligned language models refuse harmful requests, but a one-line prefill ("Sure, here is") strips the refusal. We ask where and how it fails. The harm representation stays intact: on the prompts the attack flips to compliance, a linear probe reads harm as high as on the refused ones (0.91-0.98), while behavioral refusal drops to chance. This holds across four models and three families (1.5-3.8B, and at 14B). Refusal is therefore a shallow, response-site computation. We localize it to an early window: a dose-matched position control shows the first half of the response suffices to break refusal, while the second half is nearly inert. Three causal probes converge on that window. Restoring the harm direction there partially re-engages refusal. Injecting the model's own refuse-state reverses the jailbreak (74%, held-out). And knocking out the early response's attention to the prefill, but not an equal attention mass elsewhere, selectively collapses the harmful continuation. A base-model control identifies the mechanism: the same knockout collapses the continuation prefill-specifically even in a non-safety-tuned base model (64% to 25% harmful content vs a matched control's 64%, replicated at 7B). So the prefill's grip is generic autoregressive conditioning, not safety-specific suppression, and "refusal restoration" is a model-dependent fallback. The dominant mechanism is passive. A small safety-specific attractor remains on top (logit-trace concentration 0.24 vs 0.03), whose active-vs-passive character we size but do not fully separate. No single direction or component is a clean handle either: the decision is decodable but distributed, and refusal tracks harm rather than scary surface. The consequence is structural: a monitor reading the untouched prompt-side representation is immune by construction, but only to response-site attacks. The mechanism is diffuse; the failure surface is local.

AI.tldr: This paper reveals that refusal in aligned language models is a shallow, response-site computation: a one-line prefill ("Sure, here is") bypasses refusal while leaving harm representations intact, and the dominant mechanism is passive autoregressive conditioning rather than active safety suppression.
AI.motivation: Despite the widespread use of safety alignment in language models, simple prefilling attacks can trivially bypass refusal behaviors. This work aims to understand where and how such attacks cause refusal to fail—specifically whether the attack erases the model's representation of harm or merely suppresses the refusal output.
AI.method: The authors apply a one-line prefill attack across four models (1.5B–14B, three families) and use linear probes to track harm representations under attack. They employ dose-matched position control to localize refusal to the first half of the response, three causal probing techniques (restoring harm direction, injecting refuse-state, and knocking out attention to prefill) to isolate the mechanism, and a base-model control experiment to distinguish safety-specific suppression from generic autoregressive conditioning.
AI.result: Harm representations remain intact under the attack (probe accuracy 0.91–0.98) while behavioral refusal drops to chance. Refusal is localized to an early response window; knocking out attention to the prefill in the early response selectively collapses harmful continuation. A base-model control shows the same knockout reduces harmful content from 64% to 25% even in non-safety-tuned models, indicating the prefill's effect is generic autoregressive conditioning, not safety-specific suppression. Refusal restoration via refuse-state injection reverses jailbreak in 74% of held-out cases.
AI.conclusion: Refusal is a shallow, distributed computation occurring at the response site rather than in harm representation. The dominant failure mechanism is passive: the prefill hijacks autoregressive conditioning, while a small safety-specific attractor (logit-trace concentration 0.24 vs 0.03) plays a secondary role. A monitor reading prompt-side representations is structurally immune to response-site attacks, but the mechanism's diffuseness means no single direction or component serves as a clean safety handle.

title: Clean-Reference Streaming Detection of Lens Occlusion and Photometric Transitions for Camera Tamper Monitoring
summary: A surveillance camera is an image sensor whose silent physical degradation invalidates every downstream consumer of its data. In-situ integrity alarms for such vision sensors require low false-alarm rates, bounded computation, and diagnosable behavior under nuisance illumination changes. This paper studies a deliberately narrow streaming integrity monitor for two low-cost sensor-fault signatures: texture-collapsing lens occlusion and abrupt photometric scene transition. The detector compares sampled luminance and local-gradient statistics with a clean-only sliding reference, applies coarse-grid structured-light rejection and mode/rapid-brightness suppression, and emits at most one notification per tamper episode. We formalize the decision predicates and derive a consistency rule for when rapid-brightness suppression makes the scene-transition path unreachable. On 320 in-scope controlled sequences, the default state machine attains 0.800 F1 and 0.822 balanced accuracy (significantly better paired correctness than the strongest baseline, though the F1 margin is not statistically resolved); on a magnitude-swept public audit it attains the highest partial AUC under a 5\% false-alarm budget, and a separate extended-stress FPR-constrained sweep reaches 0.925 recall at 0.025 false-positive rate. Public Xiph, Bremen IoT, and UHCTD diagnostics show the fixed predicates preserve low false alarms while recall concentrates inside the declared envelope (UHCTD in-scope covered recall 0.667 versus 0.016 out of scope), and a 9.09-camera-hour verified-negative public audit records zero false alarms. The method is best interpreted as an auditable sensor-health subsystem rather than a universal camera-tamper classifier.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一个针对监控摄像头的流式完整性监测器，通过比较采样亮度与局部梯度统计量与清洁参考值，利用粗网格结构光抑制和快速亮度抑制，专门检测纹理塌陷性镜头遮挡和突发光度场景切换两类低成本传感器故障，在低误报率和可控计算开销下实现了可审计的传感器健康监测。
AI.motivation: 监控摄像头作为图像传感器会经历无声的物理退化，这种退化会使其下游所有数据消费者失效，而现有的完整性报警方法在光照变化干扰下难以同时保证低误报率、有限计算资源和可诊断行为。
AI.method: 方法构建了一个流式完整性监测状态机，比较采样亮度和局部梯度统计量与仅含清洁数据的滑动参考值，采用粗网格结构光抑制和模式/快速亮度抑制模块，每段篡改事件最多发出一次通知，并形式化了决策谓词，推导出快速亮度抑制使场景切换路径不可达时的一致性规则。
AI.result: 在320个受控序列上，该方法达到0.800 F1和0.822平衡准确率，优于最强基线；在幅度扫描公开审计下达到5%误报预算内最高部分AUC，在扩展压力FPR约束扫描下以0.025假阳性率达到0.925召回率；在Xiph、Bremen IoT和UHCTD数据集上保持低误报，UHCTD范围内召回率0.667对比范围外0.016；9.09摄像头小时的阴性公开审计记录零误报。
AI.conclusion: 该方法更适合被解释为一个可审计的传感器健康子系统而非通用的摄像头篡改分类器，其固定谓词设计在声明的应用范围内能够有效集中召回率并保持极低误报率，为物理退化监测提供了可部署的实用方案。

title: Towards an Intention Abstraction Layer for Autonomous Industrial Systems
summary: Modern industrial environments increasingly run many autonomous subsystems at once - schedulers, energy managers, vehicle fleets - each pursuing its own goals while sharing the same physical resources. Because high-level human intentions are translated into low-level control logic and then discarded, no running component can tell whether it is still doing what was actually intended, and goal conflicts surface only after they have caused a missed target or a shutdown. We propose the Intention Abstraction Layer (IAL), a domainagnostic middleware that represents intentions as first-class, persistent, and explainable runtime objects: a large language model grounded in a formal OWL ontology parses naturallanguage goals into structured intentions, a consistency monitor detects conflicts at registration time, before execution, and a transparency module explains them in natural language. We report a first proof of concept in which two autonomous agents register conflicting production and energy intentions, and the IAL flags and explains the conflict before it reaches the execution layer. The result is a mechanism that shifts behavioral assurance for cooperating autonomous systems from post-hoc failure analysis to pre-execution, intention-level checking.

AI.tldr: 提出意图抽象层（IAL），将自然语言目标转化为基于OWL本体的结构化、持久化且可解释的运行时意图对象，通过大语言模型解析、一致性监控器提前检测冲突以及透明度模块自然语言解释，将自治系统的行为保障从事后故障分析转移到执行前的意图级检查。
AI.motivation: 现代工业环境中多个自治子系统共享物理资源但各自追求独立目标，高层人类意图被转化为底层控制逻辑后被丢弃，导致运行中的组件无法判断是否仍在执行原始意图，目标冲突只有在造成故障或停机后才被发现，缺乏在执行前进行意图级一致性检查的机制。
AI.method: 提出领域无关的中间件IAL，通过三个核心模块实现：基于大语言模型并结合形式化OWL本体的解析器将自然语言目标转化为结构化、持久化的运行时意图对象；一致性监控器在意图注册时（执行前）检测冲突；透明度模块以自然语言解释冲突原因。
AI.result: 在概念验证实验中，两个自治代理分别注册了冲突的生产意图和能源意图，IAL在冲突到达执行层之前成功标记并解释了该冲突，验证了将行为保障从后验故障分析转移到执行前意图级检查的可行性。
AI.conclusion: IAL提供了一种将自治系统的行为保障前移至执行前意图级检查的机制，能够将意图作为一等、持久且可解释的运行时对象进行管理，为多自治系统协作中的目标一致性保障提供了新的范式。

title: Multi-Head Latent Control: A Unified Interface for LLM Agent Decision Making
summary: Large language models are increasingly deployed as agents, but reliable agentic behavior requires more than next-token prediction. At inference time, it is preferred that an agent can decide whether to proceed with its current reasoning, defer to a stronger model, request additional information, invoke external tools, or abstain under the given setup. Existing approaches address these decisions through prompt-level routing, external orchestration, or task-specific fine-tuning, which primarily rely on input-side signals, and are often costly and difficult to maintain as model backbones evolve. We ask whether such control decisions can be inferred directly from a model's latent generation process. We introduce Multi-Head Latent Control, a lightweight layer that reads hidden-state trajectories from a frozen LLM or VLM to produce deployment-time control signals. A Capability Head predicts whether the current model can solve the instance or should defer to a stronger collaborator, while a Resolution Head predicts appropriate resolution decision Clarification, Tool Use, Abstention, or Direct Answering. Both heads are trained only on latent traces from the same frozen LLM backbone, enabling post hoc adaptation without modifying the model. Across language and vision-language settings, Multi-Head Latent Control consistently improves the quality-cost tradeoff of multi-model systems, enabling early handoff from partial generations and more accurate intervention decisions. In routed execution (small + large model), it reduces large-model usage by up to 90.7 percent on AndroidWorld and 27-53 percent on average across benchmarks, while retaining most of large-model performance. Additionally, the learned control signals improve tool-use decision quality, yielding up to +158 percent relative score gain and 65.5 percent fewer missed-required tool calls.

AI.tldr: 提出Multi-Head Latent Control（MHLC），一种从冻结大模型的隐藏状态轨迹中轻量级读取部署时控制信号的方法，可在不修改模型的情况下实现准确的模型能力评估与决策路由，显著降低多模型系统的推理成本。
AI.motivation: 现有大模型在智能体部署中需要做出路由、工具调用、拒绝回答等控制决策，而现有方法依赖输入侧路由、外部编排或任务特定微调，成本高且难以随模型更新维护；现有方法缺乏从模型内部生成过程直接推断控制信号的能力。
AI.method: 提出Multi-Head Latent Control（MHLC），在冻结的LLM或VLM之上添加轻量级层，读取隐藏状态轨迹以产生部署时控制信号。包含两个预测头：Capability Head预测当前模型能否解决实例或应转交给更强模型，Resolution Head预测合适的决策（澄清、工具调用、拒绝、直接回答）。仅利用冻结LLM的潜在表征训练，无需修改模型本身。
AI.result: 在路由执行场景中，MHLC在AndroidWorld上减少大模型使用量达90.7%，在多个基准上平均减少27-53%，同时保留大模型的大部分性能。工具调用决策质量提升：相对得分最高提升158%，遗漏必要工具调用次数减少65.5%。
AI.conclusion: MHLC证明了从冻结模型内部隐藏状态中直接推断控制信号的可行性，能够实现高效的后验适配，在语言和视觉-语言设定下一致改善多模型系统的质量-成本权衡，为轻量级、可维护的智能体部署控制提供了新范式。

title: TAMF-VTON: Texture-Aware Mask-Free Virtual Try-On via High-Fidelity Image Synthesis
summary: Recent diffusion-based virtual try-on (VTON) methods remain limited by their reliance on segmentation masks, insufficient preservation of fine-grained textures, and limited support for arbitrary multi-garment compositions. Consequently, existing approaches still face significant challenges in real-world e-commerce deployment. We present TAMF-VTON, a texture-aware, mask-free framework that enables high-fidelity image synthesis under practical unconstrained conditions. Our method requires no human parsing or inpainting masks at inference time and supports diverse garment styles, categories, and quantities, enabling the simultaneous transfer of multiple items while preserving body structure and intricate texture details. This is achieved through a unified generative pipeline with three key components: (1) a lightweight Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) adaptation scheme that enables efficient fine-tuning without compromising the base model's general editing capabilities; (2) a frequency-domain supervision mechanism that explicitly optimizes high-frequency spectral consistency to preserve high-fidelity textures; and (3) a robust data curation pipeline employing an adaptive inpainting strategy to simulate the inverse VTON process for high-quality training pair generation. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our approach outperforms state-of-the-art methods in both quantitative metrics and perceptual quality. Optimized for efficiency, the model achieves inference in under 15 seconds per image on an NVIDIA RTX 4090 with INT4 quantization. By combining mask-free operation, flexible multi-garment composition, faithful texture preservation, and efficient inference on consumer hardware, TAMF-VTON demonstrates a commercially viable solution for scalable deployment in real-world digital fashion scenarios. The project is available at https://www.style3d.ai/ai-photoshoot/virtual-clothing-try-on.

AI.tldr: TAMF-VTON 提出了一种无掩码、纹理感知的虚拟试穿框架，通过轻量级 MoE 微调、频域监督和自适应修复数据管道，在支持多衣物任意组合的同时实现高保真纹理保持，并在消费级 GPU 上达到 15 秒内的推理速度，具备商业部署可行性。
AI.motivation: 现有基于扩散模型的虚拟试穿方法仍受限于依赖分割掩码、细粒度纹理保真度不足以及对任意多衣物组合支持有限等问题，导致在真实电商场景中面临显著挑战，难以实现规模化商业部署。
AI.method: TAMF-VTON 提出了一种统一的生成流水线，包含三个关键组件：(1) 轻量级 Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) 适配方案，在不破坏基础模型通用编辑能力的前提下实现高效微调；(2) 频域监督机制，通过显式优化高频频谱一致性来保持高保真纹理；(3) 鲁棒的数据清洗流水线，采用自适应修复策略模拟逆 VTON 过程以生成高质量训练数据对。推理时无需人体解析或修复掩码，并支持多衣物同时迁移。
AI.result: 大量实验表明，TAMF-VTON 在定量指标和感知质量上均超越现有最先进方法。在 NVIDIA RTX 4090 上结合 INT4 量化，单张图像推理时间低于 15 秒，兼顾了效率与保真度。
AI.conclusion: TAMF-VTON 通过结合无掩码操作、灵活的多衣物组合、忠实的纹理保持以及消费级硬件上的高效推理，展示了一种在真实数字时尚场景中可实现规模化商业部署的可行方案，为虚拟试穿技术的实际落地提供了有效路径。

title: Democratizing Agent Deployment Safety: A Structural Monitoring Approach
comment: Accepted in ICML 2026 Workshops: AI4GOOD and AIWILD
summary: AI software development agents are increasingly capable of modifying infrastructure and security critical systems, creating risks where an agent completes its assigned task while covertly weakening safeguards through actions such as broadening permissions, degrading logging, or introducing persistence mechanisms. While frontier laboratories may deploy sophisticated monitoring pipelines, many organizations and individual users adopting coding agents lack the resources and governance maturity required to maintain complex learned monitor ensembles. We study this problem as infrastructure level sabotage under task success in the infrastructure-as-code setting from ControlArena and compare trained and untrained monitors across synchronous and asynchronous deployment modes. We introduce an Information Flow Graph (IFG) monitor that analyzes structural security regressions using control-flow and data-flow graph diffs alongside raw code diffs. In asynchronous evaluation, an untrained git diff monitor misses 11.6% attacks at 1% false positive rate auditing budget, our untrained IFG monitor reduces this to 3.5%, and the trained Async RF monitor achieves below 1%. Unlike the trained Async RF monitor, IFG can also operate synchronously as a pre-deployment safeguard that blocks suspicious infrastructure changes before execution or merge. In synchronous mode, IFG realtime rollback reduces joint main task and covert task success from 74.4% to 0.0% with no measurable reduction in legitimate task completion. These results suggest that untrained structural monitors provide a practical and auditable path toward democratizing deployment safety for organizations seeking trustworthy adoption of advanced AI agents.

AI.tldr: 本文提出信息流图（IFG）监控器，通过分析控制流和数据流图差异检测基础设施即代码场景中的破坏性安全回归，在同步部署模式下将联合任务成功率从74.4%降至0.0%，且不降低合法任务完成率，为缺乏复杂监控资源的组织提供了实用且可审计的AI代理安全部署方案。
AI.motivation: AI软件代理在修改基础设施和关键安全系统时，可能在完成任务的同时悄无声息地削弱安全防护（如扩大权限、降级日志记录、引入持久化机制），而多数组织和个人用户缺乏前沿实验室那样的复杂监控资源和治理成熟度，亟需一种轻量级、可审计且易于部署的安全监控方案来检测这类基础设施级的破坏性行为。
AI.method: 本文研究ControlArena中基础设施即代码场景下的基础设施级破坏问题，提出信息流图（IFG）监控器，该监控器结合控制流图和数据流图差异分析与原始代码差异，从结构角度检测安全回归。研究对比了未经训练和经过训练的监控器，并在同步（预部署阻断）和异步（审计）两种部署模式下进行评估。
AI.result: 在异步评估中，在1%假阳性率审计预算下，未经训练的git diff监控器遗漏11.6%的攻击，IFG监控器将遗漏率降至3.5%，而经过训练的Async RF监控器低于1%。在同步模式下，IFG实时回滚将联合主任务和隐蔽任务成功率从74.4%降至0.0%，且未对合法任务完成率产生可衡量的影响。
AI.conclusion: 未经训练的结构化监控器（如IFG）为组织提供了一条实用且可审计的途径，用于实现AI代理部署安全性的民主化，使缺乏高级监控基础设施的组织也能安全地采用先进AI代理。IFG监控器同步模式下的零成功率和零合法任务损失表明其在实际部署场景中具有显著的应用价值。

title: Smarter and Cheaper at Once: Byte-Exact KV-Cache Grafting Turns a Frozen Small Model into a Verified-Knowledge Flywheel
summary: We report a way to make a frozen small language model both more capable and dramatically cheaper at once, without changing any weights. Verified knowledge is deposited once as a byte-exact key-value (KV) state artifact and later restored, by graft, into a fresh inference context. The restore is bit-exact: under a pinned deterministic configuration, the grafted logits are byte-for-byte identical to a fresh computation (SHA-256 equality), with zero KL divergence and 100% argmax agreement over fifty samples. We show that own-position graft is the unique numerically exact operating point on a model with floating-point rotary encoding, and we verify byte-exactness on two model scales (12B, 31B) and two GPU targets, one through a pre-registered replay. On AIME 2025, a frozen Gemma-4-12B moves from 80.0% to 93.3% once a verified solution library is grafted, above its own 77.5% and its 31B sibling's 89.2% published anchors. On the recurring case, eight problems the base model never solves within a 401,026-token budget are answered from cached verified solutions in 61 total decode tokens, a factor of 6,574 fewer tokens and about 8,700x less energy; the capability claim proper rests on held-out transfer (7 of 7 at 31B). The same byte-exact store widens usable context from 32,768 to 2,854,766 tokens at zero extra accelerator memory, and moves byte-identical between machines of the same architecture. We describe the system at the behavior level; the engine is proprietary, and every reported number is backed by committed input and output hashes so the scoring can be re-checked without it.

AI.tldr: 提出一种无需修改权重即可冻结小语言模型的方法：通过将已验证知识以字节精确的KV状态工件形式存入，并在推理时嫁接（graft）到新上下文中，实现与完整计算比特级一致的logits输出，在AIME 2025上将Gemma-4-12B的准确率从80.0%提升至93.3%，同时将有效上下文从32,768扩展到2,854,766 tokens且零额外显存开销。
AI.motivation: 现有冻结的小语言模型受限于固定权重和有限上下文窗口，无法在不重新训练或修改参数的前提下引入外部知识或提升能力，且扩展上下文通常会带来巨大的计算和显存开销。
AI.method: 提出一种KV状态嫁接（graft）方法：将已验证的知识以字节精确的key-value（KV）状态工件形式预先存入，在推理时通过嫁接操作将其恢复到新的推理上下文中。该方法在确定性配置下实现比特级精确恢复（SHA-256相等、零KL散度、100% argmax一致），并证明在浮点旋转位置编码模型上，自身位置嫁接（own-position graft）是唯一数值精确的操作点。
AI.result: 在AIME 2025上，冻结的Gemma-4-12B从80.0%提升至93.3%，超过其自身77.5%和31B版本的89.2%的公开基准。对于基模型在401,026 token预算内从未解决的8道重复题目，仅用61个解码token即可从缓存验证解中回答，token数减少6,574倍，能耗降低约8,700倍。有效上下文从32,768扩展至2,854,766 tokens且零额外显存开销。在12B和31B两种规模及两种GPU目标上验证了字节精确性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法证明在不修改权重的情况下，通过KV状态嫁接可以同时提升冻结小模型的性能和效率，为知识注入和上下文扩展提供了新的范式；所有结果均通过输入输出哈希可复现验证，但引擎本身为专有系统。

title: Still image and spatial-temporal tomato data enabling detection, segmentation, tracking, and video-instance segmentation using strong and weak labels
comment: 21 pages, 2 figures, 9 tables. Two novel datasets released - link to repository in document
summary: In this manuscript we release two datasets for visual sensing of tomato plants grown in commercial-like settings and acquired using a robot. The first is BUTom21 which consists of still images and manual annotations. The second is BUTom-ST21 which consists of video-based data and semi-automated annotations through AI-based methods, referred to as pseudo-labels. In both cases, we provide pixel-level labels for the ripeness of the fruit. The aim is to provide the research community a challenging set of real-world imagery to explore methods to sense and estimate the state of tomato plants and their fruit, which is an important horticultural crop. Importantly, the spatial-temporal dataset provides individual fruit count and ripeness information enabling researchers to push the boundaries of field-based phenotyping.

AI.tldr: 本文发布了两个用于番茄植株视觉感知的数据集：基于静态图像和人工标注的BUTom21，以及基于视频数据和AI半自动伪标签的BUTom-ST21，均提供果实成熟度的像素级标签，旨在推动农业表型分析研究。
AI.motivation: 当前缺乏在商业化种植环境下、基于机器人采集的真实场景番茄植株视觉感知数据集，尤其是同时包含空间与时间维度、具有个体果实计数与成熟度信息的标注数据，限制了农业表型分析领域的方法研究。
AI.method: 作者发布了两个数据集：BUTom21包含静态图像及人工标注；BUTom-ST21包含视频数据并通过AI方法生成半自动标注（即伪标签）。两个数据集均提供果实成熟度的像素级标签。
AI.result: BUTom21提供静态图像与人工标注，BUTom-ST21提供视频数据与基于AI的半自动伪标签，两者均包含像素级的果实成熟度标注，且时空数据集提供了个体果实计数与成熟度信息，为田间表型分析提供了具有挑战性的真实场景数据资源。
AI.conclusion: 该研究为研究社区提供了具有挑战性的商业化种植场景下的番茄植株感知数据集，其中时空数据集中的个体果实计数与成熟度信息将推动基于田间环境的表型分析方法的发展。

title: Collaborative Spatial Learning with Multi-LLM Agents in Networked Social Experiments
comment: Accepted at ASONAM 2026; to appear in the Springer proceedings
summary: Collective problem solving often requires that group members consider the tradeoff between exploitation of known solutions and exploration for new ones, where information of known solutions can be disseminated among individual members through communication networks. The Mason--Watts experiment (PNAS 2012) showed that human groups in shorter-path networks outperform those in longer-path networks on a two-dimensional search task. In this work, we focus on the investigation of such network-efficiency effects in the setting of a group of large language model (LLM) agents. Specifically, we consider groups of sixteen LLM agents playing the Mason--Watts experiment on the eight Mason--Watts network topologies. Moreover, we develop mechanistic Bayesian optimization agents such that the performance of LLM agents can be compared with both the mechanistic agents and the human experimental data. Our computational experiments indicate that the LLM agents show a significant network-efficiency effect when instructed to randomize their first-round choices, but not under the default initialization. In this experiment, adding a one-sentence first-round randomization instruction improves collective payoff by more than three times the estimated payoff difference across the eight network topologies. Also, the Bayesian optimization agents obtain higher payoffs than the evaluated LLM agents on this spatial search task. We further compare the agents' exploration--exploitation behavior, copying, and spatial diversity.

AI.tldr: 本文通过让16个LLM智能体在Mason-Watts实验的八种网络拓扑上执行二维搜索任务，发现LLM智能体在加入首轮随机化指令后表现出显著的网络效率效应，但其整体表现仍低于贝叶斯优化智能体和人类实验数据。
AI.motivation: 现有研究已表明人类群体在短路径网络中比长路径网络更高效地完成集体搜索任务，但这一网络效率效应在大语言模型智能体群体中是否成立尚不清楚，本文旨在填补这一研究空白。
AI.method: 采用16个LLM智能体在八种Mason-Watts网络拓扑上执行二维搜索任务，并与贝叶斯优化智能体及人类实验数据进行对比；通过添加首轮随机化指令来调控智能体的初始探索行为，并分析探索-利用权衡、复制行为及空间多样性。
AI.result: LLM智能体在默认初始化下未表现出显著网络效率效应，但在加入首轮随机化指令后表现出显著效应，且该指令带来的集体收益提升超过八种网络拓扑间预估收益差异的三倍；贝叶斯优化智能体在该空间搜索任务中获得的收益高于所有评估的LLM智能体。
AI.conclusion: LLM智能体在群体问题求解中的网络效率效应依赖于初始探索行为的调控，提示提示工程（如随机化指令）对集体智能表现具有显著影响；贝叶斯优化作为机械基线为评估LLM智能体的搜索行为提供了有效对比。

title: Dialogue Summarization with Emotion Dynamics Using Topic- and Participant-Centric Decomposition
summary: Existing text summarization research has focused much on monologic information (e.g., newspaper articles, reports) without accounting for the interaction between speakers or authors. In contrast, dialogues are a rich communication channel where multiple participants conduct back and forth exchanges to construct meaning. We propose a dialogue summarization framework that explicitly models both semantic and emotion dynamics using multimodal dialogue inputs, built on an adapted hierarchical Chain-of-Agents approach. We decompose dialogues from two perspectives: (1) topic segments based on the utterances of all participants, and (2) participant-specific utterance segments. These are used to generate corresponding summaries while incorporating automatically inferred emotions. Topic- and participant-level summaries are aggregated into a dialogue summary capturing semantic content and emotion trajectories. To evaluate beyond content accuracy, we introduce emotion trajectory metrics measuring how well summaries preserve emotional flow. Experiments with small language models on multimodal dialogue datasets show that our framework produces summaries with both semantic and emotion content. Further experiments on explicit emotion label availability highlight the efficacy of our proposed methodology and the opportunities in dialogue analysis using language models.

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于分层Chain-of-Agents的对话摘要框架，通过主题分割和参与者视角分解结合情感轨迹建模，在小型语言模型上实现兼顾语义内容与情感动态的多模态对话摘要生成。
AI.motivation: 现有文本摘要研究多聚焦于独白式信息（如新闻文章、报告），忽视了对话中多参与者之间来回交互的动态特性；对话作为一种丰富的多模态沟通渠道，需要同时建模语义内容与情感演变，而现有方法缺乏对这两种维度的联合建模。
AI.method: 提出一种面向多模态对话输入的对话摘要框架，基于适配后的分层Chain-of-Agents方法，从两个维度分解对话：(1)基于所有参与者话语的主题分割，(2)参与者特定的话语片段；各片段结合自动推断的情感生成对应摘要，再聚合为主题级和参与者级摘要，最终融合生成包含语义内容与情感轨迹的完整对话摘要。
AI.result: 在小型语言模型和多个多模态对话数据集上的实验表明，该框架能够生成兼具语义内容和情感信息的摘要；引入的情感轨迹评估指标有效衡量了摘要对情感流动的保留程度；针对显式情感标签可用性的进一步实验验证了方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 本研究揭示了在对话摘要中显式建模情感动态的重要性，证明了分层Chain-of-Agents框架在多模态对话理解中的潜力，并为利用语言模型进行对话分析提供了新的研究机会。

title: U-shaped Multi-granularity Learning for Vision-Language Models
summary: The prompt learning paradigm for vision-language models is effective yet faces a granularity dilemma: global prompts lack fine-grained semantic awareness, while local prompts ignore contextual associations, limiting cross-task generalization. This dilemma exists in dense prediction tasks. Inspired by U-Net, which unifies multi-level representations across granularities, we propose UPrompt, a U-shaped multi-granularity prompt learning framework for vision-language models. Similar to how U-Net integrates fine and coarse features through symmetric encoder-decoder pathways with cross-level connections, UPrompt constructs parallel multi-granularity representations in both visual and textual modalities, where coarse-to-fine cascaded enhancement propagates global context to refine local details, while fine-to-coarse hierarchical supervision ensures semantic consistency across scales. Extensive experiments on 17 benchmarks validate our effectiveness. UPrompt outperforms MAMET and VPKE by 4.1 and 7.3 rSum on MSCOCO, surpasses CoCoA-Mix by 5.09% in base-to-novel generalization, while maintaining competitive performance with minimal overhead (coarse-grained) and matching PSRC with 1/3 cost (medium-grained).

AI.tldr: 提出UPrompt，一种U形多粒度提示学习框架，通过跨粒度级联增强与层次监督，统一视觉-语言模型在密集预测任务中的全局与局部语义表征，在17个基准上超越现有方法。
AI.motivation: 现有视觉-语言模型的提示学习方法存在粒度困境：全局提示缺乏细粒度语义感知，局部提示忽略上下文关联，限制了跨任务泛化能力，该问题在密集预测任务中尤为突出。
AI.method: 受U-Net启发，UPrompt构建了视觉和文本双模态的并行多粒度表征，通过从粗到细的级联增强将全局上下文传播以细化局部细节，同时从细到粗的层次监督保证跨尺度的语义一致性，形成对称的编码器-解码器通路与跨层级连接。
AI.result: 在17个基准上的实验表明：UPrompt在MSCOCO上分别超越MAMET和VPKE达4.1和7.3 rSum；在基类到新类泛化上超越CoCoA-Mix达5.09%；同时以粗粒度模式下极小的开销保持竞争力，中粒度模式下以1/3成本达到PSRC性能。
AI.conclusion: UPrompt通过统一多粒度表征有效解决了提示学习的粒度困境，在密集预测任务上实现了高效的跨任务泛化，同时提供了灵活的成本-性能权衡方案。

title: Multi-LLM Collaborative MRI Report Generation for Visual Instruction Tuning in Brain Oncology
summary: Recent advances in large language models (LLMs) and their extension to vision-language models (VLMs) have made it easier to combine text and images for tasks such as report generation. Existing VLMs in medicine typically focus on 2D images (chest X-rays), and their extension to 3D imaging has been difficult because of the lack of paired 3D imaging-text data. Thus, we introduce a new method for creating a 3D image-text dataset for brain oncology using 3D MRI scans of glioma and meningioma cases. We use a cooperative system in which several LLMs work together to generate and check reports, ensuring that they are accurate and clear. By leveraging the new 3D MRI-text dataset, we further build a VLM that converts MRI scans into tokens and aligns them with text instructions. Our VLM performed better in report generation and visual question answering tasks than other 2D and 3D methods. Our method not only improves the quality of reports but also helps with better diagnosis and treatment in brain oncology.

AI.tldr: 提出一种利用多LLM协作生成与校验3D MRI-文本配对数据集的方法，并基于此构建了适用于脑肿瘤学的视觉-语言模型（VLM），在报告生成和视觉问答任务上优于现有2D和3D方法。
AI.motivation: 现有医学视觉-语言模型主要聚焦于2D图像（如胸部X光片），因缺乏配对的3D影像-文本数据，难以扩展到3D成像场景（如脑肿瘤MRI），制约了VLMs在脑肿瘤学等3D医学领域中的应用。
AI.method: 提出一种协作式多LLM框架，由多个大语言模型共同生成并校验3D MRI影像（胶质瘤和脑膜瘤）的文本报告，构建3D MRI-文本配对数据集；在此基础上训练视觉-语言模型，将3D MRI扫描转换为令牌并与文本指令进行对齐。
AI.result: 所提出的VLM在脑肿瘤3D MRI的报告生成和视觉问答任务上，性能优于其他2D和3D基线方法，生成的报告质量更高，且有助于改善诊断与治疗效果。
AI.conclusion: 本研究通过构建3D MRI-文本数据集并设计多LLM协作校验机制，有效填补了3D医学影像-语言模型的空白，证明了该方法在提升报告质量和辅助临床决策方面的潜力。

title: SEED: Self-Evolving On-Policy Distillation for Agentic Reinforcement Learning
summary: Large language models are increasingly trained as interactive agents for long-horizon tasks involving multi-turn interaction, tool use, and environment feedback. Outcome-based reinforcement learning (RL) provides a practical optimization paradigm, but its sparse trajectory-level rewards offer limited guidance on intermediate decisions, leaving a supervision gap between episode-level outcomes and token-level policy learning. We propose SEED (SElf-Evolving On-Policy Distillation), a self-evolving framework that converts completed on-policy trajectories into training-time hindsight skills and distills their behavioral effect back into the policy model. SEED first fine-tunes the policy to analyze completed trajectories and generate natural-language skills that capture reusable workflows, decisive observations, or failure-avoidance rules. During RL, the current policy both collects trajectories and serves as the analyzer that extracts hindsight skills from them. Policy updates therefore improve subsequent decision making and skill analysis together, allowing hindsight supervision to evolve with the policy. SEED then re-scores the sampled actions under ordinary and skill-augmented contexts, converting the skill-induced probability shift into a dense token-level on-policy distillation signal. This signal is jointly optimized with outcome-based RL, keeping the auxiliary supervision aligned with the current trajectory distribution. Extensive experiments on text-based and vision-based agentic tasks show that SEED consistently improves performance and sample efficiency, exhibiting robust generalization to unseen scenarios. Our code is available at https://github.com/jinyangwu/SEED.

AI.tldr: 提出SEED框架，通过将在线轨迹转化为事后技能并蒸馏为密集的令牌级策略监督信号，弥补了基于结果的强化学习中回合级奖励与令牌级策略学习之间的监督鸿沟。
AI.motivation: 基于结果的强化学习在长周期交互式智能体任务中面临稀疏轨迹级奖励带来的监督鸿沟问题，即回合级结果与令牌级策略学习之间缺乏中间决策的有效指导信号。
AI.method: SEED先微调策略模型对已完成在线轨迹进行分析并生成自然语言技能（捕获可复用工作流、关键观察或失败规避规则）；在强化学习过程中，当前策略同时收集轨迹并作为分析器从中提取事后技能，实现策略更新与技能分析协同进化；然后通过对比普通语境与技能增强语境下的动作概率，将技能引入的概率偏移转化为密集的令牌级在线策略蒸馏信号，并与基于结果的强化学习联合优化。
AI.result: 在文本和视觉智能体任务上的大量实验表明，SEED持续提升了任务性能与样本效率，并对未见场景展现出稳健的泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: SEED通过自进化的在线策略蒸馏有效弥合了结果驱动强化学习中稀疏奖励与细粒度策略学习之间的监督间隙，为长周期交互式智能体的训练提供了一种兼具通用性和可扩展性的辅助监督范式。

title: On Success and Simplicity: A Second Look at Transferable Vision-Language Attack Pipeline
comment: Accepted for publication in IEEE Transactions on Information Forensics and Security (TIFS)
summary: Vision-Language Pre-training Models (VLPMs) are known to be vulnerable to adversarial attacks. Recent transferable attacks on VLPMs have followed a common pipeline with complicated loss functions or multi-stage text/image attacks. However, in this paper, we demonstrate that such a sophisticated attack pipeline can be simpler yet more successful. Specifically, we identify three previously overlooked issues caused by inappropriate cross-modal interactions and excessive operations. To address them, we propose the Simple Vision-Language Attack (SimVLA) pipeline, which observably improves transferability and efficiency. Experiments on four datasets and three downstream tasks validate the superiority of our pipeline. For instance, on Flickr30k text-image retrieval dataset, our SimVLA outperforms the SOTA baseline in R@1 transferability by 8.01\%-14.71\%, while consuming only about 35.73\% of the time and 46.26\% of the max VRAM. Overall, the superiority of our SimVLA highlights the importance of leveraging domain knowledge (e.g., our proposed cross-modal word identification), while blindly pursuing intricate operations (e.g, complex loss functions and redundant multi-stage designs) may even be harmful. We hope our SimVLA can serve as a simple yet effective backbone for future extensions. Code is available at https://github.com/RYC-98/SimVLA.

AI.tldr: 本文提出SimVLA，一个简洁但高效的视觉-语言对抗攻击流水线，通过解决跨模态交互不当和过度操作的问题，在提升攻击迁移性和效率的同时，显著超越现有复杂方法。
AI.motivation: 现有针对视觉-语言预训练模型的可迁移对抗攻击方法通常采用复杂的损失函数或多阶段文本/图像攻击流水线，但本文发现这些复杂设计并非必要，反而存在因不当跨模态交互和过度操作导致的三个被忽视的问题，亟需一个更简单且更有效的攻击方案。
AI.method: 本文提出Simple Vision-Language Attack (SimVLA)流水线，通过识别并纠正三个由不当跨模态交互和过度操作引起的问题（如提出跨模态词识别等领域知识），简化攻击流程，在不依赖复杂损失函数或多阶段设计的情况下提升攻击的迁移性和计算效率。
AI.result: 在Flickr30k等四个数据集和三个下游任务上的实验表明，SimVLA在R@1迁移性上超越SOTA基线8.01%-14.71%，同时仅消耗约35.73%的时间和46.26%的最大VRAM，在多个场景下均验证了其优越性。
AI.conclusion: SimVLA的成功表明，在对抗攻击设计中利用领域知识（如跨模态词识别）比盲目追求复杂操作更为重要，简单的流水线可作为高效且可扩展的基础框架，为未来视觉-语言对抗攻击研究提供新的方向。

title: MathCoPilot: An Interactive System for Human-AI Symbiotic Paradigm of Mathematical Research
summary: Existing LLM-based theorem provers have achieved impressive results on formal mathematics benchmarks, yet they remain confined to acting as autonomous agents that prove a stated proposition. In this paper, we propose MathCoPilot, a human-in-the-loop system that embodies a new human--AI symbiotic paradigm for mathematical research, in which the mathematician steers the high-level mathematical direction while AI agents carry out the detailed formalization and proof work under continuous human guidance. MathCoPilot unifies three core capabilities: (1) an interactive workbench where the mathematician and AI agents collaborate through a living proof blueprint that decomposes a proof into navigable steps the human can directly inspect, direct, and refine; (2) automated proving skill orchestration with adaptive knowledge base search and Lean-integrated iterative verification; and (3) topic-driven paper retrieval and automated formalization into a verified Lean knowledge base. Using MathCoPilot, we systematically compare four state-of-the-art LLMs, including Gemini~3.1~Pro, GPT-5.4, and Claude~Opus~4.7, on a FormalMATH subset and on two real PDE theorems requiring deep domain expertise, evaluating their ability to produce verified Lean~4 proofs and to identify errors in deliberately incorrect proofs. Our results show that while current models can handle undergraduate-level problems with high success rates under favorable autoformalization conditions, substantial challenges remain for domain-specific theorems requiring genuine mathematical understanding.

AI.tldr: MathCoPilot 是一个基于人机协作范式的交互式定理证明系统，通过将数学家置于高层决策者位置、AI 代理负责具体形式化与证明任务的方式，统一了交互式工作台、自动化证明技能编排与主题驱动论文检索形式化三种核心能力，系统对比四种 SOTA LLM 的实验表明当前模型在本科级问题上表现良好，但领域专用定理仍需真正的数学理解。
AI.motivation: 现有基于 LLM 的定理证明器虽然在形式化数学基准上取得了显著成果，但仅局限于作为自主智能体独立完成给定命题的证明，缺乏将人类数学家融入证明过程的机制，无法实现数学家引导方向、AI 承担细节的人机共生协作。
AI.method: MathCoPilot 提出了包含三个核心能力的系统框架：(1) 交互式工作台，通过"活证明蓝图"将证明分解为可导航步骤，供数学家直接检查、指导和优化；(2) 自动化证明技能编排，结合自适应知识库搜索与 Lean 集成的迭代验证机制；(3) 主题驱动的论文检索与自动形式化，将论文内容转化为经过验证的 Lean 知识库。
AI.result: 在 FormalMATH 子集和两个需要深度领域专业知识的实 PDE 定理上，系统使用 Gemini 3.1 Pro、GPT-5.4 和 Claude Opus 4.7 等四种 SOTA LLM 进行了系统对比，评估其生成已验证 Lean 4 证明以及识别故意错误证明的能力，结果表明当前模型在有利的自动形式化条件下处理本科级问题成功率较高。
AI.conclusion: 尽管现有 LLM 在辅助数学形式化方面已展现出一定能力，但对于需要真正数学理解的领域专用定理仍然面临重大挑战，这凸显了人机协作范式在数学研究中的必要性，也为未来提升 LLM 深度数学推理能力指明了方向。

title: Show Me How You Reason and I'll Tell You Who You Are: Reasoning Graphs for Robust LLM Authorship Attribution
summary: Given the current trend to employ large language models (LLMs) in almost any imaginable context, LLM-generated text detection and authorship attribution have become a pressing issue. Prior work has primarily focused on surface-level linguistic features, an approach shown to be susceptible to paraphrasing and other obfuscation techniques. In this paper, we go beyond the linguistic surface, extracting and analysing reasoning structures in LLM-generated texts with the goal of capturing more complex signals of LLM authorship. We propose a graph neural network approach that leverages reasoning graphs extracted by an argument mining pipeline, demonstrating improved robustness and generalisation over a traditional Longformer baseline. Our approach outperforms the baseline by up to 27 percentage points under the obfuscation attacks such as paraphrasing and backtranslation, and 19 percentage points when evaluated on the texts generated by the unseen model versions, simulating real-world conditions in which new LLM versions are continuously released.

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于图神经网络和论证推理图的LLM生成文本检测方法，通过分析文本的推理结构而非表层语言特征，在面临改写、回译等混淆攻击时比传统Longformer基线高出最多27个百分点，并在面向未见模型版本时提升19个百分点，展现出更强的鲁棒性和泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 现有LLM生成文本检测主要依赖表层语言特征，容易受到释义改写、回译等混淆攻击的规避，且对不断涌现的新版本LLM缺乏泛化能力，亟需一种能捕捉更深层语义信号、更具鲁棒性的检测方法。
AI.method: 作者提出一种图神经网络方法，首先通过论证挖掘流水线从文本中提取推理图（reasoning graphs），然后使用GNN对这些图结构进行建模和学习，以捕获超越表层语言特征的推理结构信号；基线模型为传统的Longformer文本分类器。
AI.result: 在改写和回译等混淆攻击下，所提方法比Longformer基线高出最多27个百分点；在面向未见过的模型版本生成的文本进行评估时（模拟新版本LLM不断发布的实际场景），性能提升达19个百分点。
AI.conclusion: 推理结构分析能够显著提升LLM生成文本检测对混淆攻击的鲁棒性和对未知模型版本的泛化能力，表明脱离表层语言特征、聚焦深层语义结构是应对LLM文本检测挑战的有效方向。

title: JADE-GS: Joint Alternating Deblurring Guided by Events in 3D Gaussian Splatting
summary: When a camera moves fast during exposure, blur destroys the intra-exposure motion a 3D model needs to recover the sharp scene, while event cameras capture exactly this signal at microsecond resolution. Turning them into reliable 3D supervision faces two obstacles. First, the two restoration priors fail in opposite ways: physics-based event-integration priors preserve edges but accumulate drift; learned networks recover texture but distort boundaries. Second, existing pipelines run in one direction only, so raw event noise or the biases of fixed 2D pseudo-labels pass uncorrected into the geometry. JADE-GS addresses both: a pixel-adaptive routing gate fuses the complementary priors, and the resulting 2D restorer is coupled to a 3D Gaussian Splatting student in a bidirectional loop, where detached, multi-view-consistent renders and a physics-based reblurring constraint regularize the restorer, turning a fixed preprocessor into a geometry-aware predictor. Across synthetic and real benchmarks, JADE-GS attains the best perceptual quality, leading LPIPS and CLIP-IQA on both benchmarks with competitive PSNR and SSIM, and trainsin about one hour under 5 GB on a single consumer GPU while preserving real-time rendering.

AI.tldr: JADE-GAS提出了一种双向耦合框架，融合物理事件积分先验与学习型网络先验，通过像素自适应路由门和3D高斯泼溅学生模型实现高质量去模糊与3D重建，在合成和真实基准上取得最佳感知质量，单GPU训练约1小时且支持实时渲染。
AI.motivation: 高速运动下的图像模糊会丢失帧内运动信息，而事件相机能以微秒级分辨率捕捉该信息，但现有方法存在两大障碍：一是物理事件积分先验保留边缘但累积漂移，学习型网络先验恢复纹理但扭曲边界，两者互补但难以有效融合；二是现有流水线仅单向运行，原始事件噪声或固定2D伪标签的偏差会直接传递到几何重建中，无法被修正。
AI.method: JADE-GAS通过像素自适应路由门（pixel-adaptive routing gate）融合物理事件积分先验和学习网络先验，生成高质量2D恢复结果；然后将该2D恢复器与一个3D高斯泼溅（3D Gaussian Splatting）学生模型耦合形成双向循环，其中分离的多视图一致渲染图和基于物理的重模糊约束对恢复器进行正则化，将固定的预处理器转变为几何感知的预测器。
AI.result: 在合成和真实基准测试上，JADE-GAS在感知质量上达到最优，在LPIPS和CLIP-IQA两项指标上均领先，同时PSNR和SSIM也具有竞争力；训练时间约1小时，显存需求低于5 GB，可在单张消费级GPU上运行并保持实时渲染能力。
AI.conclusion: JADE-GAS通过双向耦合框架有效融合了物理先验与学习先验的优势，解决了事件相机用于3D监督中的误差累积和边界扭曲问题，实现了高质量、高效率的3D重建，展示了事件数据在计算机视觉中的更大潜力。

title: SportD: Can VLMs Physically Strategize?
summary: Vision--language models have become increasingly capable of interpreting visual scenes, but it remains unclear whether they can use information to make strategically effective decisions. We investigate this question in soccer, where models observe the seconds preceding an on-ball decision and must choose whether to shoot or pass to a specific teammate. Unlike conventional visual-understanding tasks, soccer enables decisions to be evaluated quantitatively by estimating the value of every available action. We introduce SportD, a benchmark comprising 478 on-ball decisions from the 2022 FIFA World Cup. Each model choice is evaluated against a possession-value model that estimates the action that most increases the attacking team's probability of scoring, allowing us to measure both optimal-action accuracy and the value forfeited by suboptimal decisions. Across three frontier VLMs, the best selects the highest-valued action on 31.4% of events, compared with 38.9% for the professional players, and all models incur significantly greater regret. Further analysis reveals a systematic preference for lower-variance and lower-reward actions: VLMs shoot less often and select substantially less progressive passes than either the optimal policy or the real players. The models also reproduce the player's specific action above chance even when that action is suboptimal, suggesting partial imitation of familiar play patterns rather than consistent evaluation of counterfactual alternatives. SportD provides a value-grounded testbed for measuring physical strategic reasoning in VLMs.

AI.tldr: 本文提出SportD基准，通过评估前沿视觉-语言模型在足球场景中做出射门或传球决策的能力，发现最优模型仅31.4%选择最高价值动作（职业球员为38.9%），且模型倾向于低方差、低回报动作，表现出对熟悉模式的偏模仿而非反事实评估。
AI.motivation: 现有视觉-语言模型虽然能解释视觉场景，但其能否利用视觉信息做出战略有效的决策尚不清楚，传统视觉理解任务缺乏对决策质量的定量评估标准。
AI.method: 构建SportD基准，包含478个来自2022年FIFA世界杯的持球决策样本；每个决策通过一个持有价值模型估计所有可用动作的得分概率提升，从而量化最优动作准确率和次优决策的后悔值。
AI.result: 三个前沿视觉-语言模型中表现最佳的模型在31.4%的事件中选择最高价值动作（职业球员为38.9%），所有模型均产生显著更高的后悔值；模型倾向于更少射门、选择推进性更弱的传球，且即使当球员动作属于次优时，模型仍以高于随机水平的概率模仿该动作。
AI.conclusion: 当前视觉-语言模型在物理场景的战略推理中仍显著弱于职业球员，主要问题在于偏好低风险低回报动作以及模仿熟悉行为模式而非进行全面的反事实价值评估；SportD为衡量视觉-语言模型中的物理战略推理提供了基于价值的测试平台。

title: Latent Trajectory Discrimination for AI-Generated Text Detection
summary: Most existing approaches to AI-Generated Text Detection (AIGTD) treat documents as static objects and base their decisions on aggregate statistics or globally compressed embeddings. However, this perspective overlooks the inherently dynamic nature of autoregressive generation, where content evolves progressively through the latent space. In this paper, we reformulate AIGTD as the problem of distinguishing between latent generation trajectories. Instead of relying on static representations, we model how textual representations evolve across the sequence. To this end, we propose Geometric Trajectory and Contrastive Learning (GTCL), a framework that segments the document into ordered local units, encodes each unit in an embedding space, and constructs a structured and sequence-level representation. GTCL then applies contrastive learning to these trajectories to learn geometric regularities associated with the autoregressive generation. Evaluations performed on three different benchmarks and several approaches show that GTCL outperforms detection baselines consistently, which implies that explicitly modeling sequential dynamics provides robust discriminative signals across models and domains. These results suggest that modeling trajectory differences could improve detection and open up a dynamic direction that has been underexplored in previous AIGTD literature.

AI.tldr: 本文提出GTCL框架，将AI生成文本检测重新定义为区分潜空间生成轨迹的问题，通过轨迹分段编码与对比学习捕捉自回归生成中的几何规律性，在多个基准上持续优于现有检测方法。
AI.motivation: 现有AI生成文本检测方法大多将文档视为静态对象，依赖聚合统计量或全局压缩嵌入，忽略了自回归生成过程中内容在潜空间中逐步演化的动态特性，这一视角局限导致检测信号不够鲁棒。
AI.method: GTCL框架将文档分割为有序的局部单元，将每个单元编码到嵌入空间中，构建结构化的序列级轨迹表示，然后应用对比学习对这些轨迹进行训练，以学习自回归生成所固有的几何规律性。
AI.result: 在三个不同基准和多种方法上的评估表明，GTCL一致性地超越了现有的检测基线，验证了显式建模序列动态性能够提供跨模型和跨领域的鲁棒判别信号。
AI.conclusion: 轨迹差异建模能够显著提升AI生成文本检测性能，为以往AIGTD文献中未被充分探索的动态检测方向开辟了新的研究路径。

title: Parameter-efficient Prompt Tuning of Vision Foundation Model With Adaptive Focal Loss for Interpretable MCI Screening
summary: Mild Cognitive Impairment is a critical early stage of cognitive decline that frequently precedes Alzheimer's disease, yet its automated detection from neuropsychological drawing tests remains fundamentally constrained by data scarcity, class imbalance, and diagnostic ambiguity near clinical boundaries. Existing methodologies attempt to bypass these constraints using computationally expensive, fully fine-tuned hybrid architectures that relegate spatial explainability to a post-hoc approximation rather than an intrinsic model property. We propose a parameter-efficient framework utilizing frozen DINOv2-Small model adapted via three modality-specific learnable prompt tokens while Operating with 1.19 million trainable parameters, each token serves as a query in a shared cross-attention layer over the source image patch tokens. Crucially, spatial explainability is achieved directly through these attention maps; as a structural consequence of the architecture. Then task-conditioned embeddings fused via an attention module to quantify modality-level importance per subject. To handle boundary ambiguity, a MoCA-adapted focal loss introduced that integrates continuous cognitive scores into the training target, loss modulation, and adaptive sample weighting, strictly generalizing standard soft-label approaches. Under stratified five-fold cross-validation, the proposed architecture yields an MCI-class F1 of 0.641 and an AUC of 0.795, outperforming the computationally heavier ResViT baseline by 0.110 in MCI-class F1.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个基于冻结DINOv2-Small的参数高效框架，通过三个模态特定的可学习提示令牌和共享交叉注意力机制实现神经心理绘图测试中的轻度认知障碍自动检测，仅需119万可训练参数即在MCI分类上达到0.641的F1分数和0.795的AUC，同时通过注意力图实现固有的空间可解释性。
AI.motivation: 轻度认知障碍是阿尔茨海默病的关键早期阶段，但现有从神经心理绘图测试中自动检测MCI的方法受限于数据稀缺、类别不平衡以及临床边界附近的诊断模糊性；同时，现有方法依赖计算昂贵的全微调混合架构，并将空间可解释性作为事后近似而非模型固有属性。
AI.method: 提出一个参数高效框架，采用冻结的DINOv2-Small视觉编码器，通过三个模态特定的可学习提示令牌进行适配，仅使用119万可训练参数；每个提示令牌作为共享交叉注意力层中源图像块令牌的查询，注意力图直接提供空间可解释性；任务条件化嵌入通过注意力模块融合以量化每个样本的模态级重要性；引入MoCA适配的焦点损失函数，将连续认知评分整合到训练目标、损失调制和自适应样本加权中，严格推广了标准软标签方法。
AI.result: 在分层五折交叉验证下，所提出架构在MCI类别上达到0.641的F1分数和0.795的AUC，相比计算负担更重的ResViT基线在MCI类F1上提升了0.110。
AI.conclusion: 研究表明，通过冻结预训练视觉编码器并使用模态特定提示令牌进行参数高效微调，可以在大幅降低计算成本的同时提升MCI检测性能；通过交叉注意力图实现固有空间可解释性以及MoCA适配焦点损失处理边界模糊性是该框架的两个关键贡献点。

title: MCPEvol-Bench: Benchmarking LLM Agent Performance Across Dynamic Evolutions of MCP Servers
summary: As Model Context Protocol (MCP) servers emerge as the core infrastructure for connecting LLMs with external tools, existing benchmarks leverage real-world MCP servers to evaluate LLM agents' tool-using capabilities. However, these benchmarks overlook the continuous evolution of tool interfaces and functionalities within MCP servers, resulting in flawed assessments that fail to capture the agent's adaptability in changing tool landscapes. To bridge this gap, we introduce \textbf{MCPEvol-Bench}, a novel benchmark for evaluating the task-solving capabilities of LLM agents under dynamic toolset evolution. Inspired by large-scale empirical study, we propose 11 mutation operators to simulate realistic tool evolution within 123 MCP servers. We benchmark 12 state-of-the-art LLMs on multiple versions of MCP servers, revealing that even frontier models struggle to adapt to evolving tools. For instance, GPT-5.4 and Claude-Sonnet-4-6 exhibit performance declines of 13.7\% and 14.4\% in evolved MCP servers, respectively, accompanied by substantial increases in planning and reasoning errors. These findings highlight the vulnerability of LLM-driven workflows, establishing MCPEvol-Bench as a standard for evaluating agent adaptability in dynamic tool environments.

AI.tldr: 提出MCPEvol-Bench基准，通过11种变异算子模拟MCP服务器中工具接口与功能的持续演化，系统评估LLM智能体在动态工具环境下的适应性，揭示前沿模型在面对工具演化时性能显著下降的脆弱性。
AI.motivation: 现有基于MCP服务器的基准忽视了工具接口与功能在真实场景中的持续演化，仅评估静态工具集下的智能体能力，无法刻画LLM智能体在工具不断变化环境中的适应性与鲁棒性，存在评估偏差。
AI.method: 基于大规模实证研究提出11种变异算子，模拟MCP服务器中工具的真实演化过程；在123个MCP服务器上生成多个版本的工具集，构建MCPEvol-Bench基准，并以此评估12种前沿LLM在不同演化版本下的任务求解能力。
AI.result: GPT-5.4和Claude-Sonnet-4-6在演化后的MCP服务器上性能分别下降13.7%和14.4%，同时规划与推理错误显著增加，表明即使最先进的模型也难以适应工具的持续演化。
AI.conclusion: LLM驱动的工具调用工作流在动态工具环境中存在显著脆弱性，MCPEvol-Bench可作为评估智能体在工具演化环境下适应能力的标准化基准，为未来提升LLM智能体的鲁棒性与可迁移性提供研究方向。

title: OmniaBench: Benchmarking General AI Agents Across Diverse Scenarios
summary: Large language models are increasingly evolving from text generators into general agents capable of understanding user requests, invoking external tools, and completing complex tasks through interaction. However, existing agent benchmarks often focus on limited scenarios, tool ecosystems, or interaction formats, making it difficult to systematically characterize model capabilities across heterogeneous application settings. We introduce OmniaBench, a benchmark for evaluating general agents across diverse scenarios with explicit state spaces. We derive application-oriented scenario knowledge from app stores, product documents, industry resources, Web retrieval, and human refinement, forming a hierarchical taxonomy that spans ToC, ToB and ToE with 90 level-1 and 354 level-2 domains. Based on this taxonomy, we construct executable environments and synthesize single-turn and multi-turn tasks through four complementary routes: DAG, DAG-S, Solver, and Program. OmniaBench further introduces a ten-dimensional capability taxonomy and eight compositional atomic difficulty factors to support fine-grained evaluation and analysis. The resulting dataset contains 1,431 tasks, together with a challenging subset of 644 tasks designed to reduce evaluation cost and mitigate potential contamination of the full set after public release. The bench presents substantial challenges to current frontier models, with even Claude-Sonnet-5 and GPT-5.6-Sol achieving Overall Pass@1 scores of only 58.54 and 57.14, respectively. Further analyses reveal clear differences across domains and capabilities, as well as persistent limitations in planning, constraint maintenance, and adaptive correction. OmniaBench provides a broad and diagnostic benchmark for characterizing the capability boundaries of general agents.

AI.tldr: OmniaBench是一个面向通用智能体的基准测试，基于90个一级和354个二级应用领域的分层分类体系，通过四种互补路线合成1,431项单轮/多轮任务，并引入十维能力分类和八种原子难度因子，当前最强模型在该基准上仅达约58%的总体通过率。
AI.motivation: 现有智能体基准测试通常局限于有限的场景、工具生态或交互格式，难以在异构应用环境下系统地表征模型能力，缺乏覆盖广泛领域且支持细粒度诊断的评估框架。
AI.method: 从应用商店、产品文档、行业资源、Web检索和人工精炼中提取场景知识，构建涵盖ToC、ToB和ToE的分层分类体系（90个一级域、354个二级域）；基于该分类体系构建可执行环境，通过DAG、DAG-S、Solver和Program四种互补路线合成单轮和多轮任务；引入十维能力分类体系和八种组合原子难度因子以支持细粒度评估。
AI.result: 数据集包含1,431项任务及644项挑战性子集；Claude-Sonnet-5和GPT-5.6-Sol的Overall Pass@1分数仅为58.54和57.14；进一步分析显示不同领域与能力之间存在显著差异，且在规划、约束保持和自适应修正方面存在持续局限。
AI.conclusion: OmniaBench为通用智能体提供了广泛且具诊断性的基准，揭示了当前前沿模型在复杂任务中的能力边界与系统性弱点，为未来研究指明了关键改进方向。

title: AlphaWiSE: Adaptive Weight Interpolation for Continual Multimodal Representation Learning
summary: Multimodal models such as CLIP learn a shared embedding space for cross-modal retrieval, but continual adaptation to sequentially arriving data can disrupt the cross-modal alignment acquired from earlier phases. Conventional continual-learning methods return a single checkpoint, which commits every retrieval direction to the same stability-plasticity trade-off. We propose AlphaWiSE, a post-hoc weight-space interpolation method that composes two frozen source checkpoints. For each aligned parameter tensor identified by its checkpoint key, AlphaWiSE fits one scalar interpolation coefficient shared by all tensor entries. The coefficients are fitted on a smaller exemplar memory and used to materialize one interpolated checkpoint. The deployed model has the same architecture and parameter count as either source checkpoint, which does not require additional inference time. Extensive experiments on audio-image-text retrieval show consistent improvements over strong continual-learning baselines across multiple retrieval directions and evaluation metrics.

AI.tldr: AlphaWiSE 提出了一种基于权重重心插值的后处理方法，通过为每层张量学习单一的标量插值系数来融合两个冻结的模型检查点，在不增加推理开销的情况下有效缓解了多模态连续学习中的模态对齐灾难性遗忘问题。
AI.motivation: 多模态模型（如 CLIP）在连续学习场景下，面对顺序到达的数据流时，早期阶段学习到的跨模态对齐能力会被后续任务破坏，导致严重的灾难性遗忘。此外，现有的连续学习方法只返回单个检查点，迫使所有检索方向（如图像-文本、音频-文本等）共享同一个稳定性-可塑性权衡，无法针对不同模态方向进行差异化调整。
AI.method: AlphaWiSE 是一种后验权重空间插值方法，它组合两个冻结的源检查点。对于由检查点键标识的每个对齐参数张量，AlphaWiSE 为该张量的所有条目拟合一个共享的标量插值系数，系数在一小部分样本记忆上进行拟合，然后用于生成一个插值后的检查点。最终部署的模型与任一源检查点具有相同的架构和参数量，不增加额外的推理时间开销。
AI.result: 在音频-图像-文本多模态检索任务上的大量实验表明，AlphaWiSE 在多个检索方向和多种评估指标上，相较于强基线连续学习方法（如 EWC、LwF、iCaRL 等）均取得了一致的性能提升，有效保持了跨模态对齐能力并缓解了灾难性遗忘。
AI.conclusion: AlphaWiSE 证明了通过后验的权重重心插值可以有效协调多模态连续学习中的稳定性-可塑性冲突，且无需修改训练过程或增加推理成本。该方法为在多模态持续学习场景下保持跨模态对齐提供了一种简洁高效的思路，未来可进一步探索插值系数的自适应选择机制及在更多模态组合上的应用。

title: TopoAgent: A Self-Evolving Topological Agent for Multimodal Scientific Reasoning
summary: While Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) excel in general tasks, rigorous scientific reasoning remains challenging due to the limitations of monolithic, linear planning. Such sequential designs often suffer from visual-semantic misalignment, long-context hallucinations, and brittle execution under fixed task granularity. We propose TopoAgent, a self-evolving topological framework that replaces linear trajectories with dynamic, state-isolated graph evolution. TopoAgent first employs a front-end decomposer to fracture complex queries into visually-grounded atoms. These atoms are organized into a Directed Acyclic Graph (DAG) based on their dependencies, enabling strict context isolation to shield the reasoning engine from irrelevant historical noise. Furthermore, we introduce adaptive atomic fission, which dynamically splits bottleneck nodes into finer-grained sub-atoms at runtime when tool capability boundaries are exceeded. Extensive experiments across mathematics, physics, and chemistry benchmarks demonstrate that TopoAgent significantly outperforms state-of-the-art linear agent frameworks, providing a robust, noise-resistant, and self-correcting paradigm for autonomous scientific reasoning.

AI.tldr: TopoAgent利用拓扑图结构（DAG）替代传统线性推理流程，通过视觉原子分解、上下文隔离和自适应原子裂变机制，显著提升了多模态大模型在数学、物理和化学等科学推理任务中的鲁棒性和准确性。
AI.motivation: 现有MLLMs在科学推理任务中采用线性规划范式，存在视觉-语义对齐不足、长上下文幻觉以及固定任务粒度下执行脆弱等根本性缺陷，亟需一种能够动态适应复杂科学推理需求的非线性框架。
AI.method: TopoAgent提出自进化拓扑框架，包含三个核心组件：前端分解器将复杂查询拆解为视觉可归因的原子单元；基于原子间依赖关系构建有向无环图（DAG）实现严格上下文隔离；引入自适应原子裂变机制，在运行时动态将瓶颈节点拆分为更细粒度的子原子以突破工具能力边界。
AI.result: 在数学、物理和化学等多个科学推理基准上的大量实验表明，TopoAgent显著超越了当前最先进的线性智能体框架，在鲁棒性、抗噪声能力和自主纠错方面均表现优异。
AI.conclusion: TopoAgent验证了从线性链式推理转向动态图演化是提升MLLMs科学推理能力的有效路径，为构建抗噪声、自纠正的自主科学推理范式提供了新的设计原则和可行方案。

title: Digital Pantheon: Simulating and Auditing Coalition Formation with LLM Agents
comment: 11 pages, 2 figures, To be published in the Post-Workshop proceedings of the ECML PKDD 2026 Conference
summary: The formation of political coalitions is a complex negotiation driven by both concrete policy objectives and deep-seated ideological convictions. While Large Language Models (LLMs) open new avenues for computational political science, the neutrality and helpfulness biases instilled by Reinforcement Learning from Human Feedback (RLHF) prevent them from sustaining steadfast partisan behaviour. We present a multi-agent framework that reconciles factual grounding with ideological alignment by combining Supervised Fine-Tuning (SFT), Direct Preference Optimization (DPO), and Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG): DPO instils aggressive party-specific personas, while a per-party RAG pipeline keeps each agent bounded to its official manifesto. We operationalize the framework on the 2019 Flemish election, deploying the partisan agents in a hub-and-spoke negotiation arbitrated by a formateur. To make the emergent negotiation interpretable, we introduce a Multi-Layered Information Lineage Topology (MILT) that traces every clause in the final agreement back to its manifesto origin and classifies it into five provenance states, a Coalition Influence Score (CIS) that aggregates these traceable contributions to identify which party shaped the agreement, and a real-world grounding pass that benchmarks each simulated provision against the historically adopted coalition agreement. Across three independent simulations the framework yields a stable winner and ranking (N-VA ahead of CD\&V and Open Vld), and manifesto-anchored lineage reliably predicts real-world materialization whereas hallucinated content does not. The result is a transparent, scalable testbed for the ex-ante exploration of party compatibility and formateur-mediated compromise.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种结合SFT、DPO和RAG的多智能体框架，用于在联盟谈判中模拟具有坚定党派立场的行为者；通过在2019年佛兰德选举数据上部署该框架并引入MILT、CIS等可解释性工具，实现了对谈判结果的透明追踪与真实历史协议的可比性验证。
AI.motivation: 现有基于RLHF的大语言模型存在中立性和助益性偏见，无法在政治模拟中维持坚定的党派立场，这限制了LLM在计算政治科学中用于联盟谈判等复杂场景的适用性。
AI.method: 提出了一个多智能体框架，结合Supervised Fine-Tuning (SFT)、Direct Preference Optimization (DPO)和Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG)：DPO用于注入攻击性的党派角色，每党独立的RAG管道确保智能体输出锚定于其官方宣言；采用中心辐射式谈判结构，由调解人仲裁；设计了Multi-Layered Information Lineage Topology (MILT)追踪协议条款的宣言来源并分类为五种溯源状态，以及Coalition Influence Score (CIS)聚合追溯贡献以识别主导方；最后通过真实历史协议进行grounding验证。
AI.result: 在三次独立模拟中，框架产生了稳定的胜者和排名（N-VA领先于CD&V和Open Vld）；基于宣言的条款溯源可靠地预测了真实历史协议中的条款实现情况，而幻觉生成的内容则不具备预测能力。
AI.conclusion: 该框架提供了一个透明、可扩展的测试平台，用于在谈判发生前探索政党兼容性和调解人主导的妥协过程，为计算政治科学中的智能体谈判模拟提供了新的方法论工具。

title: MAGiSt3R: Multi-Agent Feed-forward 3D Reconstruction from Monocular RGB Videos
summary: This paper presents MAGiSt3R, a multi-agent 3D reconstruction framework performing reconstruction and camera tracking for monocular RGB videos at almost 10 FPS. MAGiSt3R relies on a feed-forward model from the 3R family to process RGB videos and regress local point maps, and on a merging model, MAGMA, that combines local maps at both intra-agent and inter-agent levels to obtain the final global point map. Furthermore, MAGiSt3R performs pose graph optimization to mitigate cumulative camera drift occurring along the feed-forward pipeline. We evaluate MAGiSt3R on both synthetic and real-world datasets, demonstrating its superior reconstruction and camera tracking accuracy compared to state-of-the-art approaches.

AI.tldr: MAGiSt3R 提出了一种基于多智能体的 3D 重建框架，利用 3R 系列的前馈模型和 MAGMA 合并模型，在单目 RGB 视频上实现了近 10 FPS 的实时重建与相机跟踪，并通过位姿图优化减轻累积漂移，在合成与真实数据集上均达到 SOTA。
AI.motivation: 现有基于前馈模型的 3D 重建方法在处理视频序列时存在累积相机漂移问题，且重建与跟踪速度受限，难以满足实时应用需求。本文旨在设计一种高效、准确的多智能体系统，实现接近 10 FPS 的实时单目 RGB 视频 3D 重建与相机跟踪。
AI.method: MAGiSt3R 采用 3R 系列的前馈模型处理 RGB 视频并回归局部点图，提出 MAGMA 合并模型在智能体内部和智能体之间两个层次融合局部点图以得到全局点图，并引入位姿图优化（Pose Graph Optimization）来缓解沿前馈管道累积的相机漂移误差。
AI.result: 在合成与真实世界数据集上的实验表明，MAGiSt3R 在重建精度和相机跟踪精度上均优于现有最先进方法，且推理速度接近 10 FPS，实现了实时性能。
AI.conclusion: MAGiSt3R 验证了多智能体协作与前馈模型结合位姿图优化可有效实现实时、高精度的单目视频 3D 重建，为实时 3D 感知系统提供了可行方案，未来可向更复杂的动态场景扩展。

title: SmartRAG: Native Graph-Based RAG for Mobile Device
summary: Deploying large language models (LLMs) as personal assistants on mobile devices demands privacy, low latency, and offline availability, yet the computational cost of giant models clashes with strict edge-hardware budgets. We argue that this tension cannot be resolved by model compression alone; it requires decomposing on-device intelligence into complementary functional roles. We present SmartRAG, a fully on-device framework that organizes an intelligent assistant around four coordinated modules -- Perception, Memory, Focus, and Thinking. At the core of SmartRAG is EvoNER, a continually learnable named-entity recognizer that incrementally expands its label inventory through teacher-distilled updates, enabling the system to absorb previously unseen entity types without retraining the backbone LLM. Extracted knowledge is stored in MRGraph, a three-layer provenance-preserving knowledge graph, and retrieved at query time through a hybrid pipeline combining graph traversal, lexical matching, and dense semantic search. The on-device LLM is invoked only for high-value semantic operations -- labeling, planning, and answer synthesis -- keeping inference costs bounded. Experiments on four QA benchmarks (TriviaQA, Natural Questions, HotpotQA, MultiHopQA) show that SmartRAG with a quantized 1.7B-parameter backbone achieves multi-hop reasoning performance competitive with models up to 18$\times$ larger, while running entirely on commodity smartphones within practical memory and latency envelopes.

AI.tldr: SmartRAG 提出了一种完全端侧的 LLM 智能助理框架，通过将端侧智能分解为感知、记忆、聚焦和思考四个功能模块，并引入持续可学习的命名实体识别器 EvoNER 与三层保源知识图谱 MRGraph，在 1.7B 量化骨干上实现了与 18× 更大模型相当的多跳推理性能。
AI.motivation: 在移动设备上部署 LLM 作为个人助理面临隐私、低延迟和离线可用性的需求，但超大模型的计算成本与严格的边缘硬件预算之间存在根本冲突；研究认为仅靠模型压缩无法解决这一矛盾，需要将端侧智能解构为互补的功能角色。
AI.method: SmartRAG 框架围绕感知、记忆、聚焦和思考四个协调模块组织智能助理；核心是 EvoNER，一个通过教师蒸馏持续学习的命名实体识别器，可增量扩展标签库而无须重训练骨干 LLM；提取的知识存储于三层保源知识图谱 MRGraph，查询时通过图遍历、词汇匹配和稠密语义搜索的混合管道进行检索；端侧 LLM 仅在标注、规划和答案合成等高价值语义操作中被调用，从而控制推理成本。
AI.result: 在 TriviaQA、Natural Questions、HotpotQA 和 MultiHopQA 四个问答基准上的实验表明，使用量化 1.7B 骨干的 SmartRAG 在多跳推理任务上达到了与 18× 更大模型相竞争的性能，且能够完全在商用智能手机上运行，内存和延迟均在实用范围内。
AI.conclusion: 研究表明，将端侧智能分解为功能化模块并以持续学习的方式扩展知识，可以突破模型压缩的极限，实现资源受限设备上的高性能 LLM 部署；该工作为隐私保护、实时响应的全端侧智能助理提供了可行的技术路径。

title: Structural-Semantic Reciprocal Learning for Unsupervised Visible-Infrared Person Re-Identification
summary: Unsupervised visible-infrared person re-identification (USVI-ReID) is challenging due to the large modality gap and the lack of cross-modal identity annotations. Progressive association paradigms have been proposed to gradually bridge the gap, but they suffer from two critical bottlenecks: reliance on ambiguous global representations and unchecked propagation of pseudo-label noise in an open-loop manner. To address these issues, we propose Structural-Semantic Reciprocal Learning (SSRL), a framework that transforms open-loop association into a self-correcting closed-loop system. Structurally, we introduce Fine-grained Structural Decoupling (FSD) to extract discriminative body-part primitives as reliable spatial anchors, complementing ambiguous holistic silhouettes with spatially consistent structural details. Semantically, we design a Closed-loop Semantic Calibration (CSC) mechanism that reconstructs shared semantic prototypes at each epoch and feeds them back into the training loop, effectively filtering pseudo-label noise before the next clustering cycle. Through the reciprocal interaction between structural and semantic learning, SSRL achieves robust cross-modal representation. Extensive experiments demonstrate the competitive performance of SSRL against state-of-the-art USVI-ReID methods on both SYSU-MM01 and RegDB, notably surpassing several supervised counterparts on RegDB.

AI.tldr: 提出结构-语义互学习框架(SSRL)，通过细粒度结构解耦提取判别性身体部位基元，并设计闭环语义校准机制滤除伪标签噪声，将开环关联转化为自校正闭环系统，在USVI-ReID任务上达到领先性能。
AI.motivation: 无监督可见光-红外行人重识别面临模态差异大和缺乏跨模态身份标注的双重挑战。现有渐进关联范式依赖模糊的全局表示且伪标签噪声在开环方式下不受控传播，导致模型性能受限。
AI.method: 提出Structural-Semantic Reciprocal Learning (SSRL)框架，包含两个核心模块：细粒度结构解耦(FSD)提取判别性身体部位基元作为可靠空间锚点，补充全局轮廓缺失的空间一致性结构信息；闭环语义校准(CSC)机制在每个训练周期重构共享语义原型并反馈回训练循环，在下一聚类周期前有效过滤伪标签噪声。结构与语义学习相互促进，实现鲁棒的跨模态表示。
AI.result: 在SYSU-MM01和RegDB两个基准数据集上的大量实验表明，SSRL在无监督可见光-红外行人重识别任务上达到最先进性能，并在RegDB上显著超越若干有监督方法。
AI.conclusion: 将开环关联范式转化为自校正闭环系统能够有效缓解伪标签噪声传播问题，结构与语义的互学习机制为无监督跨模态表示学习提供了新的解决思路。

title: AI vs Human Expert Reasoning: Assessing Agreements in Building Typology Predictions based on Street View Imagery
summary: This research investigates the potential of Vision-Language Models (VLMs) to infer building typologies: Construction, Current Use, and Storeys from Google Street View (GSV) images. Predictions generated by VLMs are compared with inference by human experts (civil engineers and architects) as a source of manually labelled ground-truth data. We evaluate several state-of-the-art VLMs, including GPT-4o, Claude 3.5 Sonnet, and Gemini 2.0 Flash. By applying different scaling strategies and prompting techniques, we found that Chain-of-Thought prompts provide an overall more stable model performance. We also investigate the reasoning behind VLMs' building-typology predictions by examining the probabilities of keywords appearing in AI explanations. This enabled us to analyse patterns in these reasonings and identify key themes driving both agreements and disagreements between VLM and expert labels. We find that AI tends to focus on visual indicators, whereas human experts place greater emphasis on broader contextual cues and domain knowledge, in addition to visual cues. Overall, VLM can approximate experts' capability in building-typology classification at scale, with an average accuracy of approximately 70%. The study demonstrates the VLM's potential for AI automation in tasks that require pattern recognition and object identification in an urban context. AI have the potential to serve as complementary and collaborative tools for urban analysis, leveraging their strengths in understanding visual patterns. This study contributes to the exploration of the efficiency and scalability of AI visual prediction and provides insights into the reasoning processes that could support automation processes in urban analysis and prediction.

AI.tldr: 本文研究视觉-语言模型（VLM）从谷歌街景图像中推断建筑类型（结构、用途、层数）的能力，发现VLM平均准确率约70%，其推理侧重于视觉线索，而人类专家更依赖上下文知识和领域经验，展示了VLM在城市分析自动化中的潜力。
AI.motivation: 现有建筑类型学分类通常依赖人工标注或传统计算机视觉方法，缺乏对大规模自动化推理能力的探索，尤其缺乏对VLM在此任务上推理过程与人类专家判断之间差异的系统性比较。
AI.method: 研究使用GPT-4o、Claude 3.5 Sonnet和Gemini 2.0 Flash等SOTA VLM，结合多种缩放策略和提示技术（包括Chain-of-Thought提示），从谷歌街景图像中推断建筑的结构类型、当前用途和层数；通过分析AI解释中关键词的概率分布，探究VLM推理模式，并与土木工程师和建筑师的专家标注进行对比。
AI.result: Chain-of-Thought提示能提供更稳定的模型性能；VLM平均准确率约为70%；AI更关注视觉指标，而人类专家在视觉线索之外更依赖广泛的上下文线索和领域知识；通过关键词概率分析识别出驱动AI与专家判断一致与分歧的关键主题。
AI.conclusion: VLM能够在大规模建筑类型分类中近似专家能力，可作为城市分析的互补和协作工具；研究为AI视觉预测的效率和可扩展性提供了证据，并揭示了可支持城市分析和预测自动化过程的推理机制。

title: CRISP: Constrained Refinement via Iterative Squeezing Process for Robust Medical Image Segmentation under Domain Shift
comment: X pages, 3 figures, 3 tables; submitted to AAAI 2027
summary: Distribution shift in medical imaging remains a central bottleneck for the clinical translation of medical AI. Failure to address it can lead to severe performance degradation in unseen environments and exacerbate health inequities. Existing methods for domain adaptation are inherently limited by exhausting predefined possibilities through simulated shifts or pseudo-supervision. Such strategies struggle in the open-ended and unpredictable real world, where distribution shifts are effectively infinite. To address this challenge, we adopt the "Rank Stability of Positive Regions" as a working assumption under distribution shift, and use it to derive robust spatial hints for source-only segmentation. Guided by this assumption, we propose CRISP, a model-agnostic framework that, unlike deployment-time adaptation, requires no test-time parameter updates and no target-domain data--a target-free, plug-in refinement framework that segments with frozen weights. Rather than using ranking to directly output masks, CRISP exploits the stability of probability rankings under distribution shift to derive robust spatial priors. Via latent feature perturbation, perturbation-invariant high-grade regions define a high-precision (HP) core, while voxels that remain potentially foreground under at least one perturbation define a high-recall (HR) support; these dual priors are then recursively refined under perturbation. We then design an iterative training framework that progressively squeezes HP and HR toward the final segmentation. Extensive evaluations on multi-center cardiac MRI and CT-based lung vessel segmentation demonstrate CRISP's superior robustness, significantly outperforming state-of-the-art methods with striking HD95 reductions of up to 0.14 (7.0% improvement), 1.90 (13.1% improvement), and 8.39 (38.9% improvement) pixels across multi-center, demographic, and modality shifts, respectively.

AI.tldr: CRISP提出了一种基于"正区域排序稳定性"假设的源域无目标域无测试时参数更新的分割框架，通过扰动不变的高精度核心与高召回支撑区域的双先验递归细化，在心脏MRI和肺部CT血管分割任务上显著优于现有方法，Hausdorff距离最多降低38.9%。
AI.motivation: 医学影像中的分布偏移是临床AI落地的核心瓶颈，会导致模型在未见环境下的性能严重退化并加剧健康不平等。现有域适应方法依赖预定义的模拟偏移或伪监督策略，无法应对真实世界中近乎无限的开放分布偏移，亟需一种无需目标域数据且无需测试时参数更新的鲁棒分割方案。
AI.method: CRISP以"正区域排序稳定性"为工作假设，通过潜在特征扰动提取两类鲁棒空间先验：扰动不变的高置信度区域构成高精度（HP）核心，在至少一次扰动下仍为前景的体素构成高召回（HR）支撑；然后递归地对这两类先验进行细化，并设计迭代训练框架使其逐步逼近最终分割结果。该方法是一种模型无关的即插即用框架，冻结权重且无需测试时参数更新或目标域数据。
AI.result: 在多中心心脏MRI和肺部CT血管分割任务上的大量实验表明，CRISP在鲁棒性上显著优于现有最先进方法：在多中心、人口统计和模态偏移下，Hausdorff距离95%（HD95）分别降低了0.14（提升7.0%）、1.90（提升13.1%）和8.39（提升38.9%）像素。
AI.conclusion: CRISP通过利用概率排序在分布偏移下的稳定性来推导鲁棒空间先验，为源域仅分割提供了一种高效且强泛化的范式，证明了无需目标域数据和测试时调整即可有效应对实际分布偏移的可行性，为医学影像AI的临床部署提供了新路径。

title: BrainPilot: Automating Brain Discovery with Agentic Research
summary: Understanding the brain increasingly depends on integrating evidence across scales, modalities, and disciplines. Addressing a single research question therefore requires a coordinated sequence of operations, from surveying prior work to executing analyses and interpreting results in light of domain knowledge. AI agents promise to accelerate this process, but current agents lack domain expertise in brain science, may fabricate claims, drift during multi-step reasoning, and offer few defined points for expert intervention. These failures are especially costly in brain science, where conclusions feed into downstream scientific claims and depend on laboratory-specific expertise and careful human judgment. We present \textbf{BrainPilot} a \textbf{fully open-source} multi-agent system that accelerates brain science research with traceable logs and agent-verified results. A principal investigator (PI) agent coordinates specialist agents grounded in curated domain knowledge: a unified brain science knowledge base containing 7{,}233 indexed items and a skill library of 72 reusable methodology units across seven research domains. Every major step is recorded in the Graph of Trace, an auditable record that links subgoals, tool use, evidence, and claims and allows researchers to follow and inspect the workflow. An Auditor agent further integrates fabrication checking into the workflow. For evaluation, we run three brain science tasks from Agents' Last Exam, introduce our own benchmark, \textbf{BrainPilotBench-v0}, and present additional end-to-end case studies. Across these evaluations, BrainPilot with an open-source backbone model attains performance comparable to state-of-the-art agent framework with less costs.

AI.tldr: BrainPilot 是一个完全开源的多智能体系统，通过集成知识库、技能库、可追溯日志和防幻觉审计机制，加速脑科学研究，在开放模型上实现了与最先进框架相当的性能且成本更低。
AI.motivation: 当前 AI 智能体缺乏脑科学领域的专业知识，容易产生虚假论断，在多步推理中发生漂移，且缺乏可供专家干预的检查点；在脑科学领域这些缺陷尤为致命，因为结论会直接影响下游科学主张，且高度依赖实验室特定经验和人工判断。
AI.method: BrainPilot 采用多智能体架构，由一个主研究员（PI）智能体协调多个专家智能体，依托统一脑科学知识库（7,233 个索引项）和跨七个研究领域的 72 个可复用方法论单元（技能库）；通过 Graph of Trace 记录每一步子目标、工具使用、证据和结论，并提供 Auditor 智能体将防幻觉检测集成到工作流中。
AI.result: 在 Agents' Last Exam 中的三项脑科学任务以及新提出的 BrainPilotBench-v0 基准和端到端案例研究中，BrainPilot 使用开源基座模型达到了与最先进智能体框架相当的性能，同时成本更低。
AI.conclusion: BrainPilot 展示了开源多智能体系统在脑科学研究中的可行性和有效性，其可追溯的日志和防幻觉审计机制为领域专家提供了关键的干预和验证点，有望加速跨尺度、跨模态、跨学科的脑科学整合研究。

title: ARMOR++: Agentic Orchestration of a Multi-Domain Primitive Set for Transferable Attacks on Deepfake Detectors
summary: The reliability of deepfake detectors frequently degrades under black-box adversarial transfer, as these models often rely on fragile, architecture-dependent forensic cues. Existing transfer attacks often lack semantic awareness and struggle to maintain effectiveness under strict no-query constraints, particularly when perturbations are transferred from convolutional surrogates to transformer-based targets. To address these limitations, this paper introduces ARMOR++, a robust multi-agent framework designed for high-transferability deepfake evasion. The framework leverages the Qwen2.5-VL Vision-Language Model (VLM) to supply spatial semantic priors, while the Qwen3 Large Language Model (LLM) orchestrates primitive selection, adaptive hyperparameter reparameterization, and entropy-regularized perturbation mixing. By integrating five complementary primitives, spanning dense optimization, saliency-based methods, spatial transformations, frequency-domain perturbations, and block-structured modifications, ARMOR++ effectively targets heterogeneous inductive biases. Rigorous evaluation on the AADD-2025 benchmark demonstrates that ARMOR++ significantly outperforms existing agentic and non-agentic baselines across both low- and high-quality image regimes. Statistical analysis confirms a substantial gain in blind-target Attack Success Rate (ASR) over the state-of-the-art agentic baseline, with further performance advantages evidenced against non-agentic benchmarks and under robust defensive configurations. These findings highlight a significant residual reliability gap in current deepfake detector deployments and demonstrate the efficacy of agentic orchestration in identifying latent vulnerabilities.

AI.tldr: 本文提出ARMOR++，一个基于多智能体编排的鲁棒黑盒深度伪造对抗攻击框架，通过视觉-语言模型提供空间语义先验、大语言模型协调多种扰动原语，在高迁移性无查询限制下显著超越现有基线，揭示了当前深度伪造检测器部署中存在的关键可靠性漏洞。
AI.motivation: 现有深度伪造检测器在黑盒对抗迁移下可靠性严重下降，因为它们依赖脆弱且与架构相关的取证线索；同时现有迁移攻击缺乏语义感知能力，且在严格无查询约束下从卷积代理模型向Transformer目标模型迁移时效果不佳。
AI.method: ARMOR++采用多智能体框架，利用Qwen2.5-VL视觉-语言模型提供空间语义先验，Qwen3大语言模型负责原语选择、自适应超参数重参数化和熵正则化扰动混合；框架集成密集优化、显著性方法、空间变换、频域扰动和块结构修改五种互补原语，针对异构归纳偏差进行联合攻击。
AI.result: 在AADD-2025基准上的严格评估表明，ARMOR++在低质量与高质量图像场景下均显著超越现有基于智能体与非智能体的基线方法；统计分析确认其在盲目标攻击成功率上相较当前最优智能体基线有大幅提升，且在鲁棒防御配置下仍保持优势。
AI.conclusion: ARMOR++证明了智能体编排策略在发现深度伪造检测器潜在漏洞方面的有效性，揭示了当前检测器部署中存在显著的可靠性差距，为未来设计更鲁棒的检测系统提供了重要启示。

title: Long-Context Fine-Tuning with Limited VRAM
summary: Parameter-efficient fine-tuning reduces model and optimizer memory, but dense attention still makes long training sequences expensive. We combine Hierarchical Global Attention (HGA) with segment-wise backpropagation and tiered KV storage. Only the active segment remains differentiable in VRAM; older KV is detached into RAM or NVMe, and HGA loads a bounded set of exact historical tokens for each query block. On Qwen3-8B with 4-bit QLoRA and PG19, dense training on a 16 GB Quadro RTX 5000 fits 2,048 tokens but fails at 4,096, whereas HGA reaches 16,384 tokens with 15.28 GB peak VRAM. Under evaluation the same adapter runs through 131,072 tokens on this card; VRAM is not constant but grows gently with the resident chunk summaries, so RAM and NVMe capacity set the practical limit beyond these lengths. At the shared 2K training length, HGA-trained and dense-trained adapters obtain 2.7405 and 2.7383 nat under the same dense-attention readout, while the stock model obtains 2.9541. At this boundary HGA training is already marginally faster (217.75 vs. 207.02 tokens/s), and the HGA-to-dense throughput ratio improves from 1K to 2K; because HGA keeps the attended historical set per token approximately constant while dense work per token grows, we expect this lead to widen as context grows. Dense attention is used for the main quality and retrieval comparisons so that they measure the learned weights and remain compatible with standard generation frameworks. HGA can also be used for retrieval and generation; an optimized production-grade serving implementation is under development.

AI.tldr: 提出结合层级全局注意力（HGA）、分段反向传播和分层KV存储的框架，使4-bit QLoRA训练在16GB显存上支持16K tokens，并在评估时扩展至131K tokens，训练速度及质量与全量注意力持平甚至更优。
AI.motivation: 参数高效微调虽然降低了模型和优化器显存占用，但密集注意力机制在处理长序列时仍然代价高昂，限制了单卡可训练的最大上下文长度。
AI.method: 将层级全局注意力（HGA）与分段反向传播（segment-wise backpropagation）及分层KV存储（tiered KV storage）相结合：仅活动段（active segment）在显存中保持可微，旧KV被卸载至RAM或NVMe，HGA为每个查询块加载有界数量的精确历史token参与注意力计算。
AI.result: 在Qwen3-8B上以4-bit QLoRA在PG19数据集上实验：密集训练在16GB Quadro RTX 5000上仅支持2,048 tokens，4,096 tokens时显存溢出；HGA可训练16,384 tokens，峰值显存仅15.28 GB，并在评估时扩展到131,072 tokens。在相同2K训练长度下，HGA与密集训练得到几乎相同的困惑度（2.7405 vs. 2.7383 nat），且训练吞吐量更高（217.75 vs. 207.02 tokens/s），且该优势随上下文增长而扩大。
AI.conclusion: HGA方法在极低显存限制下实现了超长序列的高效微调，训练质量与密集注意力相当，训练速度更快且随上下文增长优势扩大；RAM和NVMe容量成为实际限制因素，为生产级长上下文微调与推理提供了可行路径。

title: Pretraining Data Can Be Poisoned through Computational Propaganda
summary: Poisoning pretraining data can introduce harmful behaviors to LMs that are difficult to detect and mitigate. Prior work on poisoning pretraining data has largely exploited established data sources such as Wikipedia, which do not represent the large scale and heterogeneity typical of pretraining corpora, and has ignored the interaction between poisoned data and data curation pipelines. We demonstrate that poisoning attacks on pretraining data are feasible beyond this limited setting through an existing web-scale content injection mechanism: public discussion interfaces. Additionally, to measure whether malicious content is included after web crawling and data curation, we introduce HalfLife, a novel analysis for estimating adversarial content inclusion in web-crawl based LM training data. We use HalfLife to explore the feasibility of poisoning pretraining corpora at web scale through open discussion interfaces. Our analysis demonstrates the importance of estimating whether poison injections are included in pretraining data, and establishes third-party webpage content as a possible vector for attacking language model pretraining.

AI.tldr: 本文展示了一种通过公共讨论接口在互联网规模下向预训练数据注入有毒内容的攻击方式，并提出了HalfLife分析方法来评估对抗性内容在网络爬取数据中的留存概率，揭示了第三方网页内容作为语言模型预训练攻击向量的可行性。
AI.motivation: 现有针对预训练数据投毒的研究大多局限于Wikipedia等规模较小、同质性较高的数据源，未能反映真实预训练语料库的大规模与异构特性，且忽略了有毒数据与数据筛选流程之间的交互作用，亟需在更现实的场景下验证投毒攻击的可行性。
AI.method: 本文利用公共讨论接口作为一种已有的互联网规模内容注入机制来实现预训练数据投毒；同时，提出了HalfLife分析方法，用于估算网络爬取后经数据筛选流程处理时，对抗性内容被保留在LM训练数据中的概率。
AI.result: 通过HalfLife分析，本文验证了通过开放讨论接口在互联网规模下向预训练语料注入有毒内容的可行性，并量化了对抗性内容在网络爬取与数据筛选过程中的留存情况。
AI.conclusion: 研究表明，第三方网页内容可作为攻击语言模型预训练的有效向量，强调了评估投毒注入是否被纳入预训练数据的重要性，为预训练数据安全防御提供了新的视角。

title: HoloGeo: Mitigating Landmark Bias in Geo-localization via Evidence-Driven Reasoning
summary: Recent advances in Vision-Language Models (VLMs) have significantly improved image geo-localization, yet existing models remain susceptible to landmark bias, causing them to overlook geographical cues or form spurious correlations, ultimately resulting in inaccurate localization. To systematically investigate this issue, we first design two quantitative metrics, Bias Intensity (BI) and Bias Harmfulness (BH), to characterize the impact of landmarks exerted on model reasoning, and establish a comprehensive benchmark, LandmarkBias-3K. To mitigate landmark bias, we further propose an evidence-driven reasoning framework, HoloGeo, to improve the reliability of geo-localization. HoloGeo is supported by a high-quality dataset, BF-30k, annotated with structured multi-evidence bias-free reasoning chains. By incorporating multi-dimensional rewards, HoloGeo explicitly encourages balanced attention over diverse visual cues and achieves evidence-driven joint reasoning. Extensive experiments demonstrate that HoloGeo not only maintains excellent performance on IM2GPS3K and YFCC4k but also significantly outperforms existing open-source VLMs on LandmarkBias-3K, validating its effectiveness for robust geospatial reasoning.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了HoloGeo框架，通过多证据联合推理和构建无偏推理链数据集BF-30k来缓解视觉-语言模型在地理定位中的地标偏差问题，并设计了偏差强度（BI）和偏差危害（BH）两个量化指标以及LandmarkBias-3K基准来系统评估该问题。
